college_info.college_name: Veer Narmad Gujarat University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements

highlights.summary:
Veer Narmad South Gujarat University admission 2026 is open. Interested students can apply at the website.

Here are some additional updates:

faqs.question: Is VNSGU Surat good for placements?
faqs.answer: VNSGU Surat has a decent record of placements for its PG 2 year courses. According to the NIRF report 2025, 239 PG 2 years students were placed from the total 1596 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 4.39 LPA.

faqs.question: Is Veer Narmad South Gujarat University private or government?
faqs.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is a private university. It is popularly known as VNSGU and is located in Surat, Gujarat. It has been accredited by NAAC with B+ grade in 2022 and is also recognised by the UGC.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at VNSGU?
faqs.answer: The university conducts entrance exams for admission to courses, including BFA, BPT, BOPTM, BSc (Nursing), etc. Admission to the MBBS course at VNSGU is based on the NEET-UG score. Veer Narmad South Gujarat University accepts national-level exam scores for PG course admissions. For MBA, the CAT/CMAT score is accepted. While MD and MS courses admissions are through NEET-PG.

faqs.question: Is Veer Narmad South Gujarat University campus safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, Veer Narmad South Gujarat University campus is safe for girls and boys. The college campus is located in Surat. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are installed in the campus to keep a check on students safety.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University are BSc and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. These courses are offered for a duration of 3 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. VNSGU courses are offered to students in both full-time and part-time modes.
They are offered across several specialisations such as Biotechnology, Bioscience, Mathematics, Computer Science, Microbiology, Human Resources Management, etc. VNSGU Surat courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Veer Narmad Surat in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Veer Narmad South Gujarat University placement 2025 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. According to the VNSGU Surat NIRF report 2023, the median package given during VNSGU Surat PG 2-year placements 2022 was INR 2.20 LPA. A total of 323 students out of 1,500 students were placed. Veer Narmad South Gujarat University placement report 2023 will be released soon on the official website.

Candidates can check the key highlights of Veer Narmad South Gujarat placement 2022 in the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University offers various programmes to students at the UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels. The university offers courses to students in streams such as Arts, Commerce, Science, Education, Management Studies, Rural Studies, Engineering and Technology, Medicine, Law, etc. At the UG level, the university provides various courses to students such as BSc, BBA, BCom, BA, BEd, BA LLB, BCA, BDes, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Veer Narmad South Gujarat University offers various courses to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. It has 9 faculty departments,  namely Faculty of Arts, Faculty of Science, Faculty of Commerce, Faculty of Law, Faculty of Architecture, etc. to offer courses to students. Some of the popular courses offered at the university are BSc, BCom, BBA, MBA, etc.
faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University?

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at VNSGU for BA?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is considered to be affordable for most students. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 23,000 - INR 7.68 lakh. The fee structure includes multiple components tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance tests or last qualifying exam as required for the VNSGU Surat admission process.
faqs.question: Is studying at VNSGU expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, VNSGU accepts entrance exam for MBA. The university accepts Common Management Admission Test (CMAT), a business aptitude test conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission to MBA/PGDM courses. CMAT is a MCQ based entrance test. It is an easy to medium difficulty level exam. Over 50,000 aspirants appear for it every year, on an average.
faqs.question: Does VNSGU accepts entrance exam for MBA?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty good placements in 2027.

review_content.Placements: There are 50 percent of students placed in our course BBA. The highest package offered is 25000, the lowest package offered is 15000, and the average package offered is 10000. 80 percent of students got their internship in the BBA course in so many companies, like Reliance and Tata, and so many other companies that have high posts.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our course are very good and are well equipped. Wi-Fi and labs are good, the library is average in our college. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the mess is also good. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are average in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good learning environment, but infrastructure needs improvement.

review_content.Placements: In our BCA batch, around 40-50% of students were placed, mostly through local IT companies and small tech firms. The highest package was about 3.5 LPA, the lowest around 1.8 LPA, and the average package remained near 2.2-2.5 LPA. Nearly 30% of students received internships in areas like IT support, data entry, and basic web development. Top recruiters included nearby software companies, service agencies, and digital firms from Vapi and Surat. The most common roles offered were Junior Developer, Data Entry Operator, Technical Support Assistant, and Web Designer Trainee. Overall, placements were decent for motivated students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (May 2025) B.Com in Accounting & Auditing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are poor, and the campus environment lacks vibrancy, activities, or practical exposure.

review_content.Placements: This college is one of the top institutes for commerce studies under Veer Narmad South Gujarat University. It's naturally sets high expectations for placements. The actual placement outcomes are quite average. Most students receive offers in the range of 2–3 LPA, and in some cases even lower. I am currently earning around Rs. 25,000 per month, so in terms of return on investment. The placement scenario is not very strong. The placement cell is active and supportive. The number of visiting companies remains limited. Additionally, academic performance plays a major role in both placements and internships. It make opportunities harder.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college has very best and experienced faculty with a Ph.D. degree; this ensures the best study.

review_content.Placements: 60 to 90 students got placement from campus. The highest package is like 4 to 5 LPA and the lowest package offered is like 2 LPA. Companies including overseas and in Surat are available. Not sure about internship. Roles like batch recruitment and sales manager etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like smart boards and proper benching in college are available. Library and computer lab have more than 4 workstations available with internet connection. College also has many celebration festivals, and the Inferno, which is the main fest of this college, gained fame in the whole of Surat.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It’s good for leaving students.

review_content.Placements: Our PG 2-year batch 2024 sees a reasonably good placement drive. I would rate it as 4 out of 5 stars, largely due to the active training and placement cell. 70 to 80 percent of the students who actively participated in the campus process are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. Our department has modern Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped specialized labs like IoT and Embedded Systems. Hostel facilities are very affordable and secure, though the mess food quality can be inconsistent.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement. Infrastructure and facilities are good, and I am satisfied with the faculty.

review_content.Placements: The college provides good placements. Around 50% of students are placed at college per annum. The highest package of lakhs is given in every course and specialization at several national and international companies for recruitment. After the 2nd year, the internship phase is given to every student as per their course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various basic facilities are available at the college. The computer science lab, canteen, and library can seat more than 50 students to read, with sports tournaments, etc. Satisfaction with the college infrastructure and facilities is high, and various types of events are ongoing.

admission_overview.college_name: Veer Narmad Gujarat University Course Admissions 2025: Courses, Application Process, Reservation Policy, Exams, FAQs

paragraphs: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) admissionsare merit and entrance-based.Veer Narmad South Gujarat University coursesare offered in Art, Science, Management, Commerce, Law, Architecture, etc. Admission to most courses atVNSGUis based on course-specific entrance exams. The university conducts course entrance exams and grants seats based on applicants’ performance in the test.
Check the below infographic for Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) admissions process:

The Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) offers 30+ courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and doctoral level. Find below the eligibility and selection process for the various courses of VNSGU:

The Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) offers more than 30 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, certificate, and doctoral levels. Below are the fees and seat intake for the variousVNSGU coursesoffered by the university:

Aspirants can use the online application portal to apply for admission to Veer Narmad South Gujarat University. However, it is recommended to check the eligibility criteria before filling out the application form. Once the application fee is paid, the form can be successfully submitted. Here is a breakdown of the admission procedure for VNSGU:Application Process:Candidates willing to be admitted at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University must fill out the university’s application form by paying the required registration fee for final submission.

Selection Round:Veer Narmad South Gujarat University admission is bothmeritandentrance exam-based.For admission to courses like MBA, VNSGU accepts admission based on valid scores in CMAT and for the majority of the programmes,and for courses like BA, BCom, BSc the selection is based on their marks in the qualifying exam.

Admission Confirmation:After the successful completion of the selection process, candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at VNSGU for document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.
For more details about Admission process of VNSGU check out the below video:

faqs.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) hasn't released any dates related to the BSc admission.The BSc admission portal is open for the academic year 2024. faqs.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University offers a BSc programme at the UG level. It is offered in full-time mode and in several specialisations. The total tuition fee of BSc at Veer Narmad Gujarat University ranges between INR 580 and INR 4.8 lakh.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc course at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University?
faqs.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University offers BSc course to students at the UG level. It is offered for 3 years in several specialisations. To be eligible for BSc at VNSGU Surat, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria set of the course. Candidates must be Class 12 passed with a 40-45% aggregate from a recognised board.

faqs.question: When will CAT 2023 results will be announced?
faqs.answer: CAT Cutoff 2023will be released in the 2nd week of January 2024, as per the official notification by the concerned authorities. It is also possible for the result to be out in the 1st week of December, 2023 too, as in 2022, the results were out on December 20, two weeks earlier than official schedule.

The program is offered in areas such as Comparative Literature, English, Hindi, Mass Communication, etc. The university also provides an integrated MA program that lasts for 5 years. VNSGU MA Integrated programme is offered in Human Resource Development. Admission to the VNSGU course is done on a basis of merit scores.

faqs.question: What documents are required while reporting for UG admissions at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University?
faqs.answer: Once Veer Narmad South Gujarat University has released the final merit list, students with admission offers must report for verification. courses_data.description: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) offers a full-time MBA in Business Administration. The duration of the course is of two-year. Admission to the programme is based on performance in the entrance exam.VNSGU MBA application process is online.

faqs.question: Are 2025 admissions open at VNSGU?
faqs.answer: VNSGU admission is open. The university conducts admission in mulitple phases. Students should visit the official website and apply accordingly. The applications should be submitted before the last application date.

faqs.question: Does VNSGU accepts entrance exam for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, VNSGU accepts entrance exam for MBA.The university accepts Common Management Admission Test (CMAT), a business aptitude test conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission toMBA/PGDMcourses. CMAT is a MCQ based entrance test. It is an easy to medium difficulty level exam. Over 50,000 aspirants appear for it every year, on an average.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to VNSGU?
faqs.answer: For getting into this university, you need to fill the application form and fee that can be done online, available on the university's own website. The admissions are truly based on entrance exams. The you need the clear the cutt offs. You can refer to previous year cut offs also. There is no way to get direct admission here.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at VNSGU?
faqs.answer: The university conducts entrance exams for admission to courses, including BFA, BPT, BOPTM, BSc (Nursing), etc. Admission to the MBBS course at VNSGU is based on the NEET-UG score. Veer Narmad South Gujarat University accepts national-level exam scores for PG course admissions. For MBA, the CAT/CMAT score is accepted. While MD and MS courses admissions are through NEET-PG.

faqs.question: What types of courses are offered at VNSGU Surat?
faqs.answer: VNSGU Surat offers plenty of courses for students. The university provides more than 30+ courses at the Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and doctoral levels. The university also offers certificate courses to its students. The specialisation range from Science, Accounting & Commerce, Mass communication and Media to Architecture, Humanities, etc. Admissions are granted on the basis of an entrance exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University?
faqs.answer: VNSGU admissions are conducted on the basis of merit and entrance exams. The university accepts state and national-level exams such as CMAT and CAT for admissions to its specific courses. To get admitted to Veer Narmad Gujarat University campus, candidates must fulfill the eligibility criteria set of the course.

placement_data.title: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University has released the total number of students placed during the 2025 placement session. A total of 178 students secured job offers during VNSGU Surat placements 2025. The complete placement report is yet to be released for the Class of 2025. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report, 239 PG 2 years students were placed from the total 1596 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 4.39 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Veer Narmad South Gujarat University in the recent past include EY, Deloitte, Wipro, Infosys , etc.

faqs.question: Is VNSGU Surat good for placements?
faqs.answer: VNSGU Surat has a decent record of placements for its PG 2 year courses. According to the NIRF report 2025, 239 PG 2 years students were placed from the total 1596 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 4.39 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the MCA placements at VNSGU Surat?
faqs.answer: VNSGU Surat MCA placement details are not released. According to VNSGU Surat NIRF report 2025, 239 PG 2 years students were placed from the total 1596 graduated students of the batch 2024. The median package offered was INR 4.39 LPA.

description: VNSGU Surat cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:
VNSGU Surat NEET Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the MBBS course for all rounds and categories under the All India quota. The cutoff was in the form of opening and closing ranks.

For the General AI category, the 2025 last round cutoff was 5503. On the other hand, for the OBC AI category, the cutoff in the last round was 8149. This difference in the ranks means that the competition for the General AI category is higher than the OBC AI category.

In this section, students can know the category, round, college, and quota-wise cutoff ranks for 2025, 2024 and 2023. According to the VNSGU Surat MBBS Cutoff 2025, the General AI category has a cutoff in the last round in 2025 at 3869. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course and category was 3080 and 3590, respectively. This difference in the ranks means that the competition for the General AI category has been fluctuating.

Since admission for the academic year 2025-26 is now closed, candidates can see the table below to know when the next academic year enrolment starts. The table below contains the NEET UG important dates 2026 for admission to the MBBS course at this university.

The NEET UG counselling process is crucial for admission to the MBBS course at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University. In the 2025-26 academic batch, there were 3 rounds of counselling conducted, with different qualifying ranks in each. Analysing the past year cutoff trend helps students know what the qualifying ranks could be for the next academic session. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round and year-wise cutoff for 2025, as well as for 2024 and 2023.

VNSGU Surat NEET PG cutoff 2025 was published for admission to MD and MS courses. The cutoff was out in the form of opening and closing ranks till round 2 for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI quota, the round 2 cutoff ranged from 1194 to 32127, with the hardest course for admission being MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, as it had the lowest cutoff rank. To know the round 2 cutoff for other offered courses, students can see below.

According to the VNSGU Surat MD cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the two easiest MD course specialisations for enrolment were MD in Bio-Chemistry, followed by MD in Pathology, with the cutoff being 32127 and 31181, respectively.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff details for other categories and courses for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

Only those students who appeared in the NEET PG entrance examination can appear in the counselling process conducted by the MCC. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the consolidated PDF list for various rounds for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

VNSGU Surat cutoff 2023 is based on GUJCET scores followed by the Counselling. The institution gants admission to the MBA, MCA, and B.Arch. courses via GUJCET. However, the admission got closed after the release of Round 3 seat allotment result. Based on GUJCET Round 1 seat allotment, the BHU cutoff 2023 has been released for B.Arch course, which stood at 20173 for the General AI category candidates. Candidates seeking admission to the VNSGU B.Arch course can refer to the table given below to ch
Candidates can check the latest round-wise consolidated lists for VNSGU cutoff 2023 and 2021 from the table below:

VNSGU Surat NATA cutoff 2024 was concluded for B.Arch at the UG level. As per the VNSGU cutoff 2024 concluding round, the B.Arch course cutoff stood at, 21181 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
VNSGU Gujarat accepts NATA scores for admission to the undergraduate courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NATA dates regarding UG admission.

VNSGU Surat Counselling 2024 has been concluded for admission to the B.Arch courses for various categories such as General AI category. Students can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling latest round seat allotment results:

Other than NEET PG, VNSGU also offers MD and MS courses through Gujarat NEET PG, followed by counselling. As per VNSGU Gujarat NEET PG cutoff 2022, the Round 1 closing rank was 261 for MDS in Public Health Dentistry under General AI category students. Below is the Round 1 and Last-round closing rank for the BHU MDS course for the General category students under the AI quota.

VNSGU Surat accepts Gujarat NEET scores for admission to MBBS course. The cutoff scores were released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 for the Round 1, the MBBS course's cutoff stood at 13159 for Government Medical College, Surat for the students belonging to the General Home State category.

The VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 has been released for all the MBA and MCA courses. The cutoff was released for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories as opening and closing ranks for All India and Home State categories. The VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 for the last-round ranged between 9910047 and 9928002 for the General AI category students. Considering the cutoff data, a fluctuating trend can be visible to the candidates belonging to General AI category. For more information, candidates can

Admission to VNSGU Surat were conducted in 2023 based on the Gujarat University's separate exam for Home State category candidates. In 2023, for the General Home State category, only Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) course's cutoff was released at a cutoff rank of 56.26. Similarly, for the OBC quota, the cutoff rank stood at 46.19.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vidyabharti Trust College of BBAReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty good placements in 2027.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are very good and are well equipped. Wi-Fi and labs are good, the library is average in our college. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the mess is also good. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are average in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by R.K. Desai Achchhariwala College of Computer and Applied SciencesReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment, but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college provides basic but useful facilities for students. Classrooms are clean and spacious, and the computer labs have the required systems for practical work, though the infrastructure is simple. The library offers course-related books and a quiet space for study. Wi-Fi is available in some areas of the campus. The college also has a small canteen, sports ground, and seminar hall for events. While the facilities are not modern or high-tech, they are sufficient for regular academic learnin...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are poor, and the campus environment lacks vibrancy, activities, or practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good overall, with a decent campus and clean classrooms. However, there are a few major limitations. The college does not provide hostel facilities. Most of the students are from Surat. Those who are not live in PGs (mostly Rs. 7,000–Rs. 8,000 per month) or in shared flats (5–6 students per flat), and a few live in the government hostel called Samras Hostel. There is no Wi-Fi access for students. It is only for administrative use. Additionally, the institute does not ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 2 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college has very best and experienced faculty with a Ph.D. degree; this ensures the best study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like smart boards and proper benching in college are available. Library and computer lab have more than 4 workstations available with internet connection. College also has many celebration festivals, and the Inferno, which is the main fest of this college, gained fame in the whole of Surat.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shri Uttar Gujarat B. B. A. CollegeReviewed on 2 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It’s good for leaving students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Our department has modern Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped specialized labs like IoT and Embedded Systems. Hostel facilities are very affordable and secure, though the mess food quality can be inconsistent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement. Infrastructure and facilities are good, and I am satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Various basic facilities are available at the college. The computer science lab, canteen, and library can seat more than 50 students to read, with sports tournaments, etc. Satisfaction with the college infrastructure and facilities is high, and various types of events are ongoing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri J S Bhakta And Shri K M Bhakta Arts And Shri A N Shah Science And Shri N F Shah Commerce CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. The building was renovated a few years ago so the infrastructure is very good. Hostels are available here so students can live here. We can say that many facilities are available here and classrooms are good. The library is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Udhna Citizen Commerce College and S.P.B. College of Business Administration and Smt. Diwaliben Harjibhai Gondaliya College of BCA and ITReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Students get substantial industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: In this college, there are almost all types of facilities, such as a huge library with all types of books for reading.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pioneer Homoeopathic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is very good, and includes a hospital.
reviews.review_text: In our course, there is a CBDC course. It gives all type of knowledge is included in it. In this, we need 50% to pass at least. Every 3 months we have a viva exam that is a periodic assessment, and every 6 months we have a term test in which there is a theory exam as well as a viva exam.  It gives best faculty staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Narmada College of Science and CommerceReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a place to brighten up ourselves.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 buildings for all courses. There is a separate building for master's course. There is a refreshment point where students sit, talk, and have some snacks. There is a huge ground in college with a cricket pitch. It has a proper basketball court. Narmada College campus is known as a green campus as it has bio-technology, and its campus has a scenic view.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Udhna Citizen Commerce College and S.P.B. College of Business Administration and Smt. Diwaliben Harjibhai Gondaliya College of BCA and ITReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not good, but okay. Students not satisfied because faculty is good, but college management is okay.
reviews.review_text: The quality of things like benches and classrooms are very poor. The computers don't work, and many things related to the classroom are not in good condition. Students are not satisfied with facilities for studying. The campus is good, but overall, the college is just okay, not very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by J. Z. Shah Arts and H. P. Desai Commerce CollegeReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provided a decent learning environment with helpful faculty and basic facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent. Classrooms are well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is well stocked and quiet for study. There was no hostel facility. The food quality in the canteen was moderate, and while basic medical support was available, sports and games facilities were limited.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ambaba Commerce CollegeReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for B.Com in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Gym equipped with all the necessary instruments, high-class library, and classrooms with AC. Different labs for various subjects, each equipped with high-tech quality and modern-day standards. World-class hostel structure, cricket playground, basketball court, and indoor table tennis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 7 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A well-rounded experience with balanced academics, facilities, and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has excellent infrastructure with well maintained classrooms and libraries. The food in the canteen is hygienic and offers a good variety. Sports and game facilities are impressive encouraging physical activity and team spirit. Overall a very nice and supportive environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I recommend students to get admission here.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are full facilities for students who learn computer courses like BCA, MCA, and B.Tech. There are advanced computer labs and an auditorium in our college. There are 3 computer labs, 7 AC classrooms, and 2 AC libraries. In our college, all facilities are of the best quality. The hostel is not available at our college. The food in the canteen is awesome. Sports area is the best. It provides all types of game equipment.

data.description: Yes, Veer Narmad South Gujarat University does offer hostel facilities. Students who are officially admitted to a course offered at the main campus of the university and wish to reside on campus opt for hostel facilities. As per the official website, there are separate hostel facilities available for boys and girls. Moreover, as per student reviews present on Shiksha, the university offers good hostel facilities. The university's in-house hostels provide quality food, electricity, and a strict but secure environment.

college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must make an online payment of INR 600 (General/ OBC (Non-Creamy)/GEN-EWS Category) and INR 300 (SC/ ST/ PWD category) against the registration. At the UG level, the college offers BDes and BBA courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MDes and MBA courses to students. BDes is provided in three specialisations and MDes is provided in two specialisations. FDDI Noida offers BDes and MDes as popular programmes. BDes and MDes students are placed in top companies.
The College offers these courses with tuition fees ranging from INR 5.83 Lakh to INR 9.43 Lakh with a duration of the respective courses ranging from 2 years to 4 years. Candidates must secure minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation. In addition, FIDDI offers courses on the basis of valid scores in the AIST entrance exam. FIDDI offers these courses with an annual intake ranging from 30 to 80 seats.
For more information about FDDI Noida check out the below video:
Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by FDDI Noida and their respective eligibility and FDDI Noida fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) MBA programme is specially designed for understanding  different domains in the practice of retail management. individual_reviews.title: Review of FDDI Noida from a current MBA student.

content.Placements: Almost all students secured placements, with the highest number being 10 LPA, the lowest being 4 LPA, and an average of around 5 companies like Zara, H&M, and several other retail and fashion organizations actively recruit on campus. The roles primarily focus on buying, visual merchandising, and operations.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi at the boys' hostel is poor, and there is no air conditioning; the same applies to the girls' hostel, where only a few rooms have AC. The humid weather makes air conditioning essential, so I do not recommend staying in the hostel. Classrooms are outdated and not equipped with the latest technology. The campus itself feels more like a factor, and there is a significant need for improvement.

paragraphs: Footwear Design and Development Institute (FDDI) offers a range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Design and Management, namelyBDes, BBA, MDes,and MBA. Candidates can apply for all the courses online/ offline. Admission BDes, MDes, and MBA is entrance exam-based, although the selection of candidates for the college-level counselling session is done basis their merit in the last qualifying examination. FDDI admission to the BBA programme is merit-based. Check below the FDDI highlights:
Particulars

Mode of study

Course Name

Footwear Design and Development Institute (FDDI) Admission 2025 is done throughAll India Selection Test (AIST).Find below the complete Admission Process of FDDI:
Step 1: Application Process
Candidates are required to first register for AIST exam by visiting the Institute's official website. After completion of the registration, candidates have to fill out the online application.
Step 2: Merit-based selection
Candidates' performance in the AIST exam will be considered for the merit list for admission to its offered courses.
Step 3: Counselling

Based on the Merit list, candidates will be called for counseling. Candidates will be selected for the counseling session based on merit list in order of their rank based on the aggregate score in All India Selection Test (AIST) 2025.
Step 4: Final admission
Candidates need to finalise their seats, by paying the course-wise admission fee.

faqs.question: Is FDDI entrance exam easy or hard?
faqs.answer: The FDDI exam is not that difficult to crack. You need to give time and practice your quantitative ability, reasoning ability and English language well. Apart from these, you also need to practice your design skills as there is a Design Aptitude Test as well. Your creativity and drawing skills will be seen at this stage. You must practice the previous years' papers to prepare yourself well for the exam. You can find a detailed information about the exam in this linkhttps://www.shiksha.com/college/footwear-design-and-development-institute-fddi/exams/fddi-aist

However, before applying for the AIST, candidates are required to be eligible: Twelve years of school education from any recognised Board. Any School or Board or University examination in India or in foreign country recognised by the Association  of Indian Universities as equivalent to 10+2 system.

Students can join the fashion or retaik industry as Retail Manager, Area Manager, Operation Manager, etc. And workwith some famous International and National brands like Uniqlo, Reliance Brands, Shoppers Stop, Lifestyle, etc. Overall students with an MBA degree from FDDI can surely have fruitful career.

faqs.question: How is FDDI Noida in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: FDDI Noida has a good record of placements for courses like BDes, MDes and MBA, etc. The complete placement report 2022 is yet to be release on the official website for the academic year 2021-2022. However, as per the limited data available on the website, an overall 86% placement rate was recorded across all the campuses of FDDI in 2022 placements. Further, over 240 recruiters participated during the 2022 placement process and placed students in various new-age job roles. The key highlights of FDDI Noida placements for the Class of 2022 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) the highest package INR 6.50 LPA Average package INR 3 LPA Placement rate 86%+ No. of recruiters 240+ Popular recruiters Clarks, Bata, Adidas, Reliance Brands, Puma India Note : The above mentioned the highest and average packages have been taken from the students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.

faqs.answer: As per the official website, various national and international recruiters visited every year at FDDI Noida and placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of who participated during the recent FDDI Noida placements included Clarks, Bata, Adidas, Sabyasachi, Reliance Group, Action International, Aqualite India, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: FDDI Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of FDDI Noida from a current MBA student.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi at the boys' hostel is poor, and there is no air conditioning; the same applies to the girls' hostel, where only a few rooms have AC. The humid weather makes air conditioning essential, so I do not recommend staying in the hostel. Classrooms are outdated and not equipped with the latest technology. The campus itself feels more like a factor, and there is a significant need for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for design, especially for footwear, leather/ graphic design, or UI/UX.
reviews.review_text: We have separate classrooms with high-tech machines for making products. Wi-Fi is not available, but classrooms are good with projectors. The institute also has a big library for students and faculty members, with all types of books available, like marketing, designing, time management, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with course content and infrastructure, but the fee is a little bit more.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good; there is a new building under construction, which is a new incubation center. I personally like the infrastructure and the course. The hostel mess is also good. The course we are studying is made by IITians. Wi-Fi covers the whole campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has some of the best machines compared to other colleges. Our college provides us with many facilities like a Wi-Fi facility, labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel facilities are not good. There is a lack of cleanliness in the hostel. The food served in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied and I would not recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good, walls are full of leakage. Almost everything is broken in this college. Washrooms and cafeteria food are also not good. The classrooms are very hot and water coolers rarely work. They provide air-conditioner in classroom in last semester, but that does not make up for the three semesters, students have to sit in extreme heat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Footwear Design and Development Institute.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and classrooms are well-equipped with the latest technologies but maintenance is poor. Students get Wi-Fi facilities on the campus, and there is an IT laboratory with good facilities. The library is small but useful. The hostel facilities are available with mess and average food quality is provided. It has a garden area on both sides of the hostel. There is also a basketball ground and badminton area and other extracurricular activities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is okay if you can afford the fee.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24*7 in our college, but it can only be connected by laptops. For this, laptops should be given to the placement cell. We have 2 libraries on our campus, which is quite good as we can find all the relevant books from there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and it gives its student equal chances.
reviews.review_text: The campus is big, but it is not well maintained. They get staff building, acad block main building, audit, mess 1 boy's hostel, and 2 girls hostels. The mess food is not good. The canteen is small, and the campus is situated on the outskirts.

reviews.review_heading: The worst for fashion students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and mess is very good, the mess food is good too. College infrastructure is nice but the labs for fashion students are not well functioning (like GC lab, the main lab) and some of the tools and other equipment they don't with them and some are restricted to use.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and infrastructure. I am dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers Wi-Fi with good speed. It has clean classrooms but with some brokerage. The library is quite decent too. The food served in a mess is bad, but the food served in the canteen is good. There is a lot of space for sports activities on our campus. Every student can use the sports equipment by using their ID cards.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for good career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is clean, and the warden is good. The food is good in the mess. The warden helps students when they are in trouble. I love the food, and no other hostel can provide such food. I recommend this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities and great teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi to all the students. Labs, classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned. Hostels are not air-conditioned. The quality of the food served is average and need to improve. FDDI organises a lot of fun activities like flash mobs, and wonderful Wednesday.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure with well-qualified faculty members and well-planned labs.
reviews.review_text: On our college campus, there are 3 buildings with classrooms, labs, library and all the facilities. There are 4 lush green grounds inside the campus. There are 2 hostels both for boys and girls hostel inside the campus. The mess was inside the hostel, and the hostel has good space and ventilated hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Footwear Design and Development Institute.
reviews.review_text: The maximum benefit taken from the college facilities was a room for indoor games from 2nd year till passing out. There was open ground for playing, and we also had a recreation centre, gym and many other things. There was a library for books. The college didn't focus on the practical knowledge and the things they could provide. It was merely an application running in the background somewhere just for the namesake.

reviews.review_heading: There is a centralized placement for all the courses. Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, libraries, and Labs are well maintained. Hostel facilities and mess food are not good enough. There are no AC rooms. Few rooms are not in good condition. There is a common washroom for girls. In mess, they provide only south Indian food so most of the north students eat in the cafeteria.

data.description: FDDI Noida faculty has years of experience and hence are professional in nature. Footwear Design and Development Institute has well-qualified and experienced faculty members. The FDDI Noida faculty are PhD, degree, and diploma holders. FDDI Noida also invites faculty for guest lectures. The college arranges workshops and training programmes for the faculty and the students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Footwear Design and Development Institute, Noida

likes.text: The students are placed in well-known brands like Bata, Skechers, Pantaloons and many more as a merchandiser, visual merchandiser, field manager, etc.
If any student left after interviews, they also get placed in a good company as this is the college's responsibility to place everyone.

likes.text: Hostel and other facilities like a cafeteria, gym and mess were also good.
We got almost all kind of facilities from our college starting from fully AC classrooms, labs with all necessary equipments, Wi-Fi availability inside the campus.

likes.text: The teachers are really great with there subjects they teach, and they are helpful if you call them during off hours.
About the courses, there are many bachelor and master courses you should choose according to your interest like leather goods, footwear technology, fashion designing and retail management.

reviews_list.review_title: Noida International University.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very high, but the average package is very low. The highest package went for about 10–12 LPA, I believe, and that too if I’m being liberal. The average package lies between 3–5 LPA. I do not have any idea about the top companies which recruited or gave internships. The roles varied from managerial roles to regular work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are below average. The Wi-Fi is very slow, the classrooms are fine, and the library is also fine. The hostel is only for MBBS students, and the fees are about 2 Lacs per year. That’s the reason we need to stay in private hostels like Annapurna, and they are not good. Wi-Fi, food, everything is in pretty bad shape.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Their facilities, teachers, and campus are really amazing.

review_content.Placements: Placement is good. Opportunities come from popular companies like Google and Microsoft. This university gives more opportunities for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Their infrastructure is really amazing, and the campus is very large. The university also has a canteen, not just one but three canteens. It has its own hospital, IIMS, a cricket team, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly educated and of very good quality. They are providing knowledge as well as great advice for the future. Exams are not very difficult because all questions come from what is taught in class. However, if you do not study and go to take the exam unprepared, you face a lot of difficulties.

overview_faqs.question: What are the important guidelines for fee refund at Noida International University?
overview_faqs.answer: In Noida International University, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. Given below are some important information for refunds:If any existing candidates are required NOC then yearly fee has to be paid.In case a candidate has been admitted with 100% NIU Scholarships on tution fee and applies for refund, in this case deduction/adjustments and refund would me made on the paid components.In case, the candidates has availed any letter or documents from University for processing the loan then refund will be through the AC payee cheque in the favour of sanctioning bank, unless the candidates submit the NOC from the bank.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Noida International University?
overview_faqs.answer: Noida International University once registration fees and application fees are paid are non-refundable. Candidates who paid fees for eserving a seat are non-refundable and non-transferable if they are less than the prescribed fee. Further, candidates can apply for a refund of programme fees by submitting an application in the prescribed format. The refund amount is deducted by 50% for administrative charges. Thecandidates are also required to return any NIU material, such as the ID card, confirmation letter, or self-learning material before leaving the university.

overview_faqs.question: Noida International university is good or bad?
overview_faqs.answer: Noida International University was established in 2010 and is sponsored by the Maruti Educational Trust. NIU University is a good university which is approved by UGC (University Grants Commission), NCTE, the Council of Architecture, the Indian Association of Physiotherapists, the Indian Nursing Council, the National Medical Commission, BCI, IIC, and AIU. Noida International University is one of the best universities in India.

review_summary.college_name: Noida International University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA (Dual Specialization) in Marketing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for placement and other facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students were placed with different organizations during campus placements. The highest package is 13.96 LPA from Zaro Education, and the average is approximately 4 LPA. The top is Zaro Education. Almost 80% of students got internships from the campus itself. The top role offered from an MBA is in sales.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the course are fantastic. It is a good place to visit and spend time, providing internet for every individual with a unique ID and password. Labs are all well-equipped and have high-end computers, with smart TVs in class and fully air-conditioned inside the building. The hostel is not on the campus. It usually gives students different hostels that are not under the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering-AI&ML in collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you have no choice left or don't plan to rely on college, then you can think about this college.

content.Placements: Since I'm still in my second year, no one from my batch has got an internship or placement till now through college, as far as I know, but yes, some are doing internships, including me, but they have got them off-campus. As for seniors, I don't hear much about their placement, although it's true that companies like IBM, TCs, and Samsung are coming to the college, but I think many just get removed in the first round. As far as I have heard from my teachers and other students.
content.Infrastructure: First of all, this college only provides hostels for some medical students. It does not have a hostel for any other schools. As for the infrastructure, I would say it is decent for what you would expect from a tier 3 college. There are six computer labs in the main Newton block. Except for 1 or 2, all the computer labs are decent enough, but I would not say the same for other labs. The library is decent too.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in International Relations - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Noida International University.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very high, but the average package is very low. The highest package went for about 10–12 LPA, I believe, and that too if I’m being liberal. The average package lies between 3–5 LPA. I do not have any idea about the top companies which recruited or gave internships. The roles varied from managerial roles to regular work.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are below average. The Wi-Fi is very slow, the classrooms are fine, and the library is also fine. The hostel is only for MBBS students, and the fees are about 2 Lacs per year. That’s the reason we need to stay in private hostels like Annapurna, and they are not good. Wi-Fi, food, everything is in pretty bad shape.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Their facilities, teachers, and campus are really amazing.

content.Placements: Placement is good. Opportunities come from popular companies like Google and Microsoft. This university gives more opportunities for students.
content.Infrastructure: Their infrastructure is really amazing, and the campus is very large. The university also has a canteen, not just one but three canteens. It has its own hospital, IIMS, a cricket team, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly educated and of very good quality. They are providing knowledge as well as great advice for the future. Exams are not very difficult because all questions come from what is taught in class. However, if you do not study and go to take the exam unprepared, you face a lot of difficulties.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is moderate. The study here is average, like all Greater Noida colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 20 percent of students got placements, I think, which is very low compared to other colleges. The highest package is around 12 LPA, I think, and the average package is 4 LPA, which is very low compared to the fees they are charging us for 4 years. Infosys-type companies hire students from our college. I don't even think that even 1 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. It has a very old computer lab, and we will not even see it until the 3rd or 4th semester. It doesn't have a hostel for B.Tech students, and it only has a hostel for medical students, which means they will give us a hostel outside the campus, which is very bad. I am currently living in it.

admission_overview.college_name: Noida International University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Currently,Noida International University admission 2025is open. The university offers various courses such as BTech, MBBS, MBA etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the institutions also offer PhD courses. The admissions committee selects candidates on the merit of entrance examination/interviews which the Institute conducts. Admissions to the programmes offered atNIUhappen through NSAT (NIU Scholarship cum Admission Test) for technical programs or through GD/PI for non-technical programmes. The university also considers state-level and national-level entrance exams like JEE & CUET. Apart from this, the university offers more than full-time 25 courses in various streams such as Law, Design, Engineering etc.

The application process at Noida International University is an online procedure. However, candidates looking for PhD course admission need to sit and appear for the in-house entrance exam followed by PI. Read the following article to know more aboutNoida International University course admission2025.

The mode of study at Noida International University admission courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the university. The mode of study for the course is full-time. Read on to know more aboutNoida International Universitycourse admissions2025.

NIU admissions to all the courses is a mix of entrance exams or merit-basis. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forNoida International University coursesadmission 2025:
NEET,UP NEET
Noida International University admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation as per respective entrance exam scores. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at NIU:
STEP 1: Noida International University Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online or offline for various course admission at Noida International University. To apply online, candidates must apply online and to apply offline, aspirants must visit the official website. The application fee is INR 1,100. However, candidates can also check theNoida International University feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students are selected based on entrance exam scores such as NSAT, CUET, NEET etc. Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

Noida International University NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Noida International University 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 69399. hostel_campus.college_name: Noida International University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Noida International University’s hostels offer students the choice of comfortable boarding facilities of single, double and triple rooms with AC and non AC options for both boys and girls. Every hostel has Wi-Fi facilities so that they can keep abreast with global events. If the boarding facilities speak of homely comfort than the dining facilities serves homely food. Scrumptious and healthy food prepared under strict hygienic conditions are served to the students during meal times.

library.description: Noida International University's Library has a collection of more than 30000 books and journals. This digital library is one of the biggest in Delhi NCR and is the pride of NIU as it has more than 1200 current International and National research papers relevant in all Schools and their respective fields.

A Committee comprising of a senior workforce and learner delegates has been constituted to take care of the issues of the cafeteria and to screen the administrations given to the clients.

paragraphs: Noida International University once registration fees and application fees are paid are non-refundable. Candidates who paid fees for eserving a seat are non-refundable and non-transferable if they are less than the prescribed fee. Further, candidates can apply for a refund of programme fees by submitting an application in the prescribed format. The refund amount is deducted by 50% for administrative charges. Thecandidates are also required to return any NIU material, such as the ID card, confirmation letter, or self-learning material before leaving the university.

Yes, NIU acknowledges merit of its students by offering generous scholarships in the form of fee waivers. These scholarships are only applicable to the tuition fees for first year. NIU has a tie-up with Punjab National Bank (PNB) for providing educational loans to its economically weaker students. For availing scholarships, candidates need to fill NSAT application form by paying an application fee of Rs 500+ GST, through debit card/ credit card/ net banking.

The total fee (tuition) for the BSc at Noida International University is 3.1 L - 7.1 L. The fee changes & depends on the level of competition & the available no. of seats. Students can reach the official site & check for the fee updates or click here

college_info.college_name: MKSSS' School of Fashion Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
School of Fashion Technology (SOFT), Pune was founded in 1998 under the aegis of old Maharshi Karve Stree Shikshan Samstha (MKSSS). It is one of the premier schools imparting education in the stream of Fashion and is located in Pune. The school is affiliated to was ranked 12 and 13 for Fashion Design by the Week 2020 and Outlook 2019. SOFT is affiliated to SNDT Women’s University, Mumbai and offers several courses in the areas of Fashion Design, Technology, Production, Merchandising, Communication, Textile Design and Sustainable Fashion. The faculty memebrs at SOFT are highly qualified and experts from the industry. They train the students and prepares them for a promising future by equipping their minds with creativity, intellect and confidence.

To provide exposure to the students, SOFT invites professionals on a regular basis from the relevant companies. It encourages students to seek and maintain links with the industry experts for a better understanding. It also conducts several lecturers and seminars by the industry experts to enhance the dimensions of design along with the technical awareness for both the students as well as the faculty members.

SOFT is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure, including a computer centre, resource centre, library, an auditorium and a health club. The school also offers hostel facilities to the students. The school has several collaborations which are presented below:

A few of the quick facts regarding SOFT Pune are tabulated below:

Read more: SOFT Pune Student Reviews

Admission process of SOFT Pune is conducted through its official website. Aspirants willing to take admission are required to apply online through the official website of SOFT. Some of the fast facts related to NIFT admission process are listed below:

Read more: SOFT Pune Admission Process

SOFT Pune offers nine progammes at the UG, PG, PG diploma and diploma level. These programmes include Bachelor of Design (BDes), Master of Design (MDes), PG diploma in Fashion Design & Merchandising. The duration of BDes programme is two years, whereas MDes and PG diploma in Fashion Design & Merchandising programmes are offered for two years each. Addtionally, the school offers UG diploma programmes in association with Pearson Business & Technology Education Council (BTEC). The below table contains an overview of popular SOFT Pune courses along with the minimum eligibility criteria and total fees:

Read more: SOFT Pune Courses and Fees

With the help of its central placement cell, SOFT Pune offers both interships as well as placements opportunities to the students by inviting top organisations every year. It conducts pre-placement interactions, Group Discussion and Personal Interview (GD/ PI) rounds for the students. Some of the recurring recruiters of SOFT Pune are Tommy Hilfiger, Calvin Klein, and Van Heusen, etc.

Read more: SOFT Pune Placements

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good but can be improved.

review_content.Placements: Every student in our college gets placed. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are AND, Biba, etc. More than 80% of students get internships. Fashion designers, fashion communication, textile design, jewellery design, and fashion management are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good but the check-in timings are a bit early. Facilities are good and can be improved, as sometimes we face issues with food, water, and others.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is a nice place to study.

review_content.Placements: There is no exact amount of placement but according to your work you will get the placement so basically work hard on your portfolio and present it well and you'll be placed. That's all you have to do for getting a better placement. You'll get enough possibilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have good machines plus you will never face the lockage of machines Computers are available mostly. Library have so many books for the one who wants to stay there and read it's a perfect place well organized. Wi-Fi is available always at the campus for each student.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Jewellery Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for learning art .

review_content.Placements: Almost 50-60%students get placed. The lowest package offered is 2 -3 Lacs. The companies such as Pantaloons, wills lifestyle, arvind textile come to the college for placement. The students also get internships from companies to learn the industrial insights. Roles are offered according to the course studied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge campus. The college is surrounded by green ambience all over. Classrooms are spacious. The college has an auditorium for any cultural programme or college fest. The hostel of the college is neat and clean. The food served is completely vegetarian.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Communication - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college offers a friendly environment and a large variety of academic courses.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't assure placements. However, they provided internship opportunities as per the student's interest. The college provides you with opportunities which will help you build a resume. They will guide you which will help you during the interviews. Placements for our batch were okay.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not that huge. There are well-equipped labs for stitching and sewing. Even there is a computer lab for fashion communications. They recently provided a handloom for a textile design course. They are expanding the campus area. The quality of the food served in the canteen is very good, and it is also yummy. There were no issues regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college follows a really good education pattern.

review_content.Placements: The college does help during internships and placements if a student asks for it. They do have a placement cell that works for only retail brands. The placement department helps one to analyze the field of interest and lets them reach through the right contact.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is really good. The machines are new, and dummies are in the right condition. We have 4 sewing labs, 4 computer labs with all the required software, 4 pattern making labs, 3 tracing tables, 3 exhibition halls, 4 textile labs, and a library. It has everything which a design student needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: All in all, a good place for you to start your journey.

review_content.Placements: They do not guarantee placements but provide internship of the students choice. Placements are given to rank holders and you have to fend for yourself. They give opportunities which will help you build your resume and during job interviews. They'll guide you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is not that huge but they have well-equipped practical labs for sewing and stitching. Also they have huge computer labs for software integrated courses like fashion communication. They recently bought a handloom for the textile design course. They are recently expanding their campus.

hostel_campus.college_name: SOFT

hostel.description: The institution has its hostel, for girl students, with a capacity of around 300 girls. There is triple sharing room accommodation with facilities like attached toilet & bathroom, 24 hours security personnel and CCTV cameras, 24 hours solar water, medical room & doctor on call, wi-fi internet facility, gymnasium and landline service in the rooms for receiving call, washing machine facility, good quality food and bus facility on Saturday & Sunday from Narhe campus to Karve Nagar campus and back.

library.description: The college library has 3550 books, 3059 titles, 213 reference books, 09 newspapers, 181 book CD's, 920 internship reports, 35 magazines & journals, 100 forecast, 100 craft documentation and 2492 old periodicals. It also has British Library membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Jogging Track, Baseball Court, Volleyball Court, Cricket, Athletics, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Badminton, Table Tennis, Yoga

library.description: The college library has 3550 books, 3059 titles, 213 reference books, 09 newspapers, 181 book CD's, 920 internship reports, 35 magazines & journals, 100 forecast, 100 craft documentation and 2492 old periodicals. It also has British Library membership.

hostel.description: The institution has its hostel, for girl students, with a capacity of around 300 girls. There is triple sharing room accommodation with facilities like attached toilet & bathroom, 24 hours security personnel and CCTV cameras, 24 hours solar water, medical room & doctor on call, wi-fi internet facility, gymnasium and landline service in the rooms for receiving call, washing machine facility, good quality food and bus facility on Saturday & Sunday from Narhe campus to Karve Nagar campus and back.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Jogging Track, Baseball Court, Volleyball Court, Cricket, Athletics, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Badminton, Table Tennis, Yoga

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Cutting Sewing and Finishing Lab, Dyeing and Printing Lab, Machine Lab, CAD-CAM Labs, Construction Lab, Textile Labs, Weaving Lab, Patternmaking Lab, Photography and Styling Studio

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good but can be improved.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good but the check-in timings are a bit early. Facilities are good and can be improved, as sometimes we face issues with food, water, and others.

reviews.review_heading: This is a nice place to study.
reviews.review_text:
They have good machines plus you will never face the lockage of machines 
Computers are available mostly. Library have so many books for the one who wants to stay there and read it's a perfect place well organized. Wi-Fi is available always at the campus for each student.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for learning art .
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge campus. The college is surrounded by green ambience all over. Classrooms are spacious. The college has an auditorium for any cultural programme or college fest. The hostel of the college is neat and clean. The food served is completely vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a friendly environment and a large variety of academic courses.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not that huge. There are well-equipped labs for stitching and sewing. Even there is a computer lab for fashion communications. They recently provided a handloom for a textile design course. They are expanding the campus area. The quality of the food served in the canteen is very good, and it is also yummy. There were no issues regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

reviews.review_heading: The college follows a really good education pattern.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. The machines are new, and dummies are in the right condition. We have 4 sewing labs,  4 computer labs with all the required software,  4 pattern making labs, 3 tracing tables,  3 exhibition halls, 4 textile labs, and a library. It has everything which a design student needs.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, a good place for you to start your journey.
reviews.review_text: Campus is not that huge but they have well-equipped practical labs for sewing and stitching. Also they have huge computer labs for software integrated courses like fashion communication. They recently bought a handloom for the textile design course. They are recently expanding their campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the good work at the college.
reviews.review_text: It has many classes along with the hostel. It has four computer labs, four garment construction labs, four pattern-making labs, one exhibition hall, one seminar hall, one library, one photo shoot room, one NSS room sports room and a textile lab. It has a canteen and stationary too.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing because of the infrastructure and guest faculty but disappointed because of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institution is very nice. Starting from the labs to the classrooms, everything is amazing. The new campus in Narhe is nice. Though the area is not that good, the campus is amazing. There are more than 200 stitching machines available for the girls.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to start your fashion learning.
reviews.review_text: All the needed facilities were there. The library contained all the informative books, magazines, etc. Big machines were needed for the design course and various materials were available. Seminar halls, an amphitheater, and other such rooms were there for activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good opportunities, and it has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The food is good. The college has a huge amphitheater and a good library. The library has many recent books about designers and collections. Classrooms are well-lit and big enough. I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is nice, but there is no exposure.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities such as Wi-Fi, library, etc. There is also a studio where we do all the shootings while we learn photography. The hostel is really nice, and it is very neat and clean. Hygiene is maintained in the hostel. The food served is not bad and also not good, but it is better than the food served in other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for learning art .
reviews.review_text: - College and hostel has a good and well maintained infrastructure. - Spacious classrooms, garment construction lab with well maintained machines, library, pattern making lab, resource center, computer lab with wi-fi facility and advanced software and auditorium. Canteen served completely vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum and qualified professionals but disappointing as there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Though the surrounding area is not so good, the college provides high security. The campus is equipped with labs, enough classrooms with good ventilation, library, etc. Certain software are available only on few computers. The hostel is a four-floor building with good rooms and fair facilities. The food quality in the canteen is standardized.

college_info.intro:
IDeA World College popular programmes are BDes, BSc in Design, and diploma courses. While studying BDes, students will be offered one year of a fully paid internship. Students are given an opportunity to take part in the various live projects and participate in several international design exhibitions. The student's work is showcased in various world-leading publications offline and online. IDeA World College is ranked among the top 10 design institutes in India.
IDeA World College is visited by top companies such as Raymond, Puma, Tommy Hilfiger, and others. IDeA World College has professional faculty members. IDeA World College faculty motivates students to work on their knowledge and skills. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by IDeA World College and their respective eligibility and IDeA World College fee structure:
