review_summary.college_name: IDeA World College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has top-notch teachers. It offers the best interior design course in Bangalore.

content.Placements: I am just 4 months into the course, and I am not too sure about the placement drive regarding which companies will come or not. I have heard that the last month of the one-year course would be filled with internships and exams. We will find out at that time.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure in general is great. Classrooms are very wide and beautifully designed with glass. As our course is rather practical-work-based, we do not have requirements for any library here. There is a hostel here for students, but they usually guide us to stay at some nice PGs.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best interior design institute in Bangalore.

content.Placements: The environment here provides a better opportunity to get placements in relation to interior designing. The institution is keen on making us train in such a way that it becomes easier for the final rounds. Apart from that, placements also come with good exposure towards the industry, so that's another plus point.
content.Infrastructure: The college itself is pretty immersive, with well-established classrooms. Many facilities are available, such as air-conditioners and digital learning. It even provides a mini snacks counter for students. All items are well-furnished. The college itself is decorated to inspire an interior awareness.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Top interior design Diploma in Bangalore.

content.Placements: I have just started this course about a few months ago, therefore I cannot say much in that regard. The placement drive only starts after our interior design Diploma course. The college provides a 100 percent placement assistance, and I find it really hopeful.
content.Infrastructure: The college is lovely. As an interior design student, I find it absolutely a treat how well-designed the college is. The classrooms are big and spacious. They have glass walls instead of regular ones. It is really beautiful. We do not have an hostel here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best teachers, top Fashion Design College.

content.Placements: The top roles vary in different sectors, and since I am just in my first year, I am not very sure about the placement process, but from what I have heard, the college provides 100 percent placement assistance and has a good alumni network, and I am looking forward to when my time comes.
content.Infrastructure: The department is great with labs and proper equipment for Fashion Design, the classrooms are nice and well-ventilated, there is no hostel facility, but the administration can guide you regarding nearby stays, and there is a small canteen at my campus where we can usually find chips and cup noodles.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best fashion design college, skilled mentors.

content.Placements: I am in my second year currently. From what I have heard, the batch before our batch, almost everyone got placed, and a few of them opted for higher studies. The college provides a 100% placement assistance as well. Teachers guide us mostly regarding the right internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college is perfectly well put together. I find it Instagram-friendly, to be honest. On the aesthetics side, the college provides an adequate lab for all the assignments. The classrooms have screens for presentation and projections. There is a small canteen for fingerfood on campus too.

reviews.review_heading: It has top-notch teachers. It offers the best interior design course in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure in general is great. Classrooms are very wide and beautifully designed with glass. As our course is rather practical-work-based, we do not have requirements for any library here. There is a hostel here for students, but they usually guide us to stay at some nice PGs.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best interior design institute in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The college itself is pretty immersive, with well-established classrooms. Many facilities are available, such as air-conditioners and digital learning. It even provides a mini snacks counter for students. All items are well-furnished. The college itself is decorated to inspire an interior awareness.

reviews.review_heading: Top interior design Diploma in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The college is lovely. As an interior design student, I find it absolutely a treat how well-designed the college is. The classrooms are big and spacious. They have glass walls instead of regular ones. It is really beautiful. We do not have an hostel here.

reviews.review_heading: Best teachers, top Fashion Design College.
reviews.review_text: The department is great with labs and proper equipment for Fashion Design, the classrooms are nice and well-ventilated, there is no hostel facility, but the administration can guide you regarding nearby stays, and there is a small canteen at my campus where we can usually find chips and cup noodles.

reviews.review_heading: Best fashion design college, skilled mentors.
reviews.review_text: The college is perfectly well put together. I find it Instagram-friendly, to be honest. On the aesthetics side, the college provides an adequate lab for all the assignments. The classrooms have screens for presentation and projections. There is a small canteen for fingerfood on campus too.

reviews.review_heading: Great exposure, top fashion design college in Bangalore, and best teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college is compact, and I love how they have fit in everything here perfectly. The classes have screens and beautiful glass benches. The labs are filled with machines, so there has never been an issue with our assignments. There is no hostel on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members, top fashion design college in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are designed for a fashion design degree with screens and machines for use. There are many machines in the lab, so all the classes can use them whenever required. We never had any requirement for library, usually, the teachers help us with the extra study materials.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, best fashion design degree, great exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very beautiful interior, and the classes are really equipped for the type of course they are assigned to. There is no requirement for a library so far as our course is very practical-based. There are screens in every classroom for presentations and all.

reviews.review_heading: Best fashion design college. Top fashion designing faculty, great exposure.
reviews.review_text: My department is mostly equipped with everything required. The labs are nice and there are lots of machines. The classrooms are amazingly designed with a glass desk and glass walls. There are screens in every classroom for presentations and better studies.

reviews.review_heading: Best fashion designing college with industry exposure and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available for the students. The classrooms are really great. I find the campus very aesthetically pleasing. There is no hostel facility available on the campus. There are small canteens for snacks on every campus, which is great. We have a whole floor for indoor games as well.

reviews.review_heading: Top fashion design college in Bangalore, and best fashion design diploma course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have Wi-Fi, fully air-conditioned, and beautiful designed with glass. There is no requirement for us to work with a library, so I am not sure. Labs are very nice. I am very new to sewing and stuff, and it's been nice with the labs. There is no hostel available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best Fashion Design college in Bangalore, with great faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Although the college is compact, labs are equipped with enough machines to sustain more than 40 students at a time. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and computers to help with design as well. We never have any requirement for a library, as our course is mostly practical.

reviews.review_heading: Best fashion design college in Bangalore, Top-notch faculty, Beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are tailored to each course, and it is very thoughtfully designed. The labs have well-equipped computers with useful software. For our other labs, there are many high-end machines. There is no hostel available on the campus, but there are smaller snacks available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great faculty. It is the best fashion design college in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are great. We never really had any use for a library, as the teachers mostly helped us with all the study materials. There is a hostel available here. There are small snack counters available on every campus, and I am often found there in those corners.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the best faculty, top fashion designing diploma course.
reviews.review_text: The labs are great as there are many machines. We never have to fight over a machine. The classrooms are designed for every course. There are projectors and screens in every classroom. The benches are designed beautifully. Everything is made of glass; the walls and the desks are all glass.

data.description: The faculty at IDeA World College are experienced and skilled. IDeA World College faculty motivates students to work on their knowledge an skills.

college_info.intro:
Shivaji University offers undergraduate, postgraduate and PhD courses. Some of the most popular programmes include MBA and BTech.
The MBA programme is offered by the Management Department of the university, which provides top notch facilities to students to make them competent leaders. The Department of Management and Commerce also organises various programmes such as the Industry-Institute Interaction Programme for the overall development of the students. Additionally, the university offers an MBA programme in the ODL (open and distance learning) mode. Furthermore, SUK offers the AICTE-approved, Online MBA programme in the following electives:
The university also offers a 4-year BTech in specialisations like Computer Science & Technology, Chemical Engineering, ETE, Civil Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering, etc. Popular Shivaji University programmes are in the table below, along with their specialisations and fee details:
For more information about Shivaji University check out the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Shivaji University offers various courses to candidates. These are offered in fields such as Arts, Commerce, Science, etc.

Shivaji University courses include BTech, BEd, BSc and other courses at the UG level. For PG students, Shivaji University provides courses such as MA, MTech, MBA, MCom, MPharma, and MEd, among others. In addition to this, the Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE) also provides all these courses. Candidates can check the along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the following table:

faqs.answer: A:    Shivaji University cutoff 2024 to BTech courses is based on MHTCET scores. As per Shivaji University MHTCET cutoff 2024, the CSE rank stood between 6.89 and 50.6 for the General AI category candidates, under which, Nanasaheb Mahadik College of Engineering has the highest cutoff percentile for General category All India candidates. Candidates can check out the cutoffs for various BTech courses from the official Shivaji University Page:
faqs.question: What is the cutoff of Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    The entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University for BTech course include JEE Main/ MHT CET. Moreover, for BArch course include MHT JEE Main (Paper 2)/ MHT CET. Further, for MBA courses, the entrance exams accepted include CAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAT/ MAT/6 CET. The entrance exams accepted for M.Tech course at Shivaji University include GATE/ MHT CET. For PhD course, the entrance exams accepted include the UGC NET/ GATE/ GPAT/ Shivaji University entrance test.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    Shivaji University seats are limited. Students are given a seat through entrance + counselling basis. The intake depends on programme and specialisation. The intake for the programmes is as below:CoursesSeat IntakeBTech360MSc230MCA60MBA60BEd50
faqs.question: What is the seat availability at Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    The Shivaji University NEET PG Cutoff 2025 was released till Round 2 for all categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff ranged from 5391 to 93592 for admission to the Rajiv Gandhi Medical College, Thane, wherein MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology and MS in ENT were the top two most sought-after courses for this category, with the closing ranks of 5391 and 12659, respectively. Note: This is the round 2 closing cutoff for the General AI category in the aforementioned college, other categories, quotas, rounds, and colleges will have different cutoffs accordingly.
faqs.question: What is the Shivaji University NEET PG Cutoff 2025?

reviews_list.review_title: Affordable fees, supportive staff, but average campus life.

review_content.Placements: I studied bachloer of commerce from Shahaji Mahavidyalaya, Kolhapur located in Dasra Chowk. 10% of students got placed in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, the lowest was 4 LPA. Recruiting companies were Flipkart, Tata Consultancy, ICICI Bank, and HDFC Bank. 20% of students got internships at companies like ICICI Bank, KPMG, and EY. Roles offered were customer service officer and back office.
review_content.Infrastructure: I think facilities in my college were good. Clean water was available. Classroom and seperate library were available. There was no Wi-Fi. Quality of college canteen was good, and cheap food was available. Sports like kabbadi, kho-kho, and cricket were available. Medical facilities were very poor.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is the best in my living area, and the faculty is also very good.

review_content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of students were placed in my college. 4 Lacs was the highest and 1 to 1.5 Lacs is the lowest and 2.5 Lacs is average package offered in my college Wipro, bajaj, mahindra, tcs, ibm, lti, cognizant, accenture inphosys 60 to 80 percent of students were placed got internship from my course and in inphosys, bajaj, wipro companies Software develops, trainee engineer, it support execute, contractor.
review_content.Infrastructure: The schedule is moderate, with around 5 to 15 lectures per week. The facilities are very good. Teaching was also very good, and the facilities include Wi-Fi in the departments. The average quality of the facilities in our hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food is good, available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also good in our college, and sports and games are well supported; there are separate periods for games and sports.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBA available in Shivaji University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, an MBA is available at Shivaji University. The university offers this programme in two modes, distance and online. For both modes, the duration of the course is two years, and the mode of education is full-time. Students enrolled in this programme study different facets of Management. Moreover, the university also offers an MBA programme via its affiliated colleges.

review_summary.college_name: Shivaji University Kolhapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is best and the faculty is also good.

content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent of students got placed from my college. 4.5 LPA is the highest and 1.5 LPA is the lowest average package in my college. Bharat Forget, Tata Motors, Bajaj Auto, hohn deere, Land Core, and Capgemini are recruiting companies. 60 to 70 percent of students got internships from my course in college, such as Software developer, trainee engineer, and junior programmer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: All infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: Companies come for SGM placements, such as Bajaj, TCS, Wipro, and Mahindra. So many students are placed in these companies and work happily, and the salary packages are average or moderate. The lowest package of placements is 1.5 lacs, and the highest packages are approximately 4.5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: In college, Wi-Fi is available everywhere for all students, and classrooms are cleaned every day with machines.
content.Faculty: The faculty is good for me and my studies. They help me with my studies by providing all study notes, important questions, and other resources. Teachers are very helpful, with qualifications and knowledge. They teach practical things in workshops and labs for real-life-based learning. The semesters are not easy but not hard. They are moderate. Teachers help with exam studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Short review of WCE Sangli.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B Tech degree in Artificial Intelligence and Machine learning from Walchand College. My college has nearly 80 to 85 percent of students placed in top companies from the CSE branch. From 2023, the college intake is increased for the CSE & IT branch and two new branches, AIML & Robotics Automation. Last year, the highest package is near 1.5 crores. Top Tech companies visited the campus, like Rubrics etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

admission_overview.college_name: Shivaji University Kolhapur Course Admissions 2026: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_overview.title: Shivaji University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Shivaji University admissions are offered on both merit and entrance basis. Students seeking admissions have to meet the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get admission. The university offers 126 undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral courses through various departments. These are Science, Arts, Technology, Management, and Commerce fields. The Shivaji University accepts the scores of national, state, and university-level entrance exams for technical courses, such as BTech, MCA, and MBA. For non-professional courses, including BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., Shivaji University admission is based on its in-house entrance test. The university also offers distance education courses approved by UGC. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Shivaji University.

paragraphs: Shivaji University admissions are held online on its official site. Students can apply after checking the eligibility. The process include application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps below to complete theShivaji University admission process:
Application Process 2026

Shivaji University admission starts with the release of the application form. Candidates can complete the application form online. The form has to be turned in with documents and application fees amount before the last date.
Selection Process 2026

Candidates are shortlisted depending on the shorlisting criteria. For professional courses, like MBA, BTech, B.Ed, MCA, etc., the university accepts national-level entrance exams, like JEE Main, GATE, UGC NET, GPAT, MH CET, etc. For non-technical courses, like BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., the university conducts its own entrance test.
Admission Confirmation

Shivaji University releases the merit list based on the cutoff scores in the accepted exams for finalising candidates. Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theShivaji University admission feesto complete the process.

TheShivaji University fee structureincludes different components. Some of these include tuition fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more. Students have to pay the amount through accepted payment gateway. The fees changes based on course and specialisation. Admission to BTech atShivaji Universityis entrance exam-based. The mode of application for BTech is online. Read on to know more about the Shivaji University BTech course.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to the BTech programme at Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BTech programme at Shivaji University Candidates must have passed class 12 or equivalent examinations with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved categories) in the aggregate,  also candidates must have appeared for any one of the entrance exams such as JEE Main/ MHT CET/ Uni GAUGE-E to be eligible for admission.

faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech course in Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech at Shivaji University ranges fromINR 51,400 - INR 4.9 lakhdepending on the specialisation the candidate is going for, as the BTech fee for candidates coming through lateral entry is different from the regular four-year BTech programme. At the time of admission, other components of the fee might be added to the tuition fee. Candidates are required to pay the registration fee ofINR 100for BTech course.

faqs.question: Is there BTech at Shivaji University Kolhapur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Shivaji University offers a BTech programme under six specialisations namely Chemical Engineering, Food Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering and Food Technology. It also provides lateral entry to students who have either completed a Diploma in engineering.

faqs.answer: To get admission in Shivaji University Kolhapur, candidates must qualify the eligibility criteria and appear for the University's entrance exam. The table below lists all kind of BSc programme offered at Shivaji University along with the eligibility criteria:ProgrammeEligibilityNano Science TechnologyCandidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.BSc - MSc integrated Nano Science Technology (5 years)Candidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.

faqs.question: How is Shivaji College and can I get admission into it with 95%?
faqs.answer: Shivaji University, located in Kolhapur, was established in1962. The university is accredited withGrade Aby theNAAC. The university affiliates276 collegesthat are spread over three districts of Maharashtra, namely, Kolhapur, Sangli, and Satara. Shivaji Uiversity has better infrstruture than most of DU's colleges. As for the placements, the university offers a decent placements package for its professonal cousres. In 2023, a total of1291 students enrolledand25 studentswereplacedduring Shivaji University placements 2023.Yes, you can get into Shivaji College with 95% in class 12th. The admission to UG courses is done on the basis of marks scored in class 12th. For example, for the BTech programme, the eligibility is 45-50 % in class 12 in the relevant stream. Therefore, with 95% in class 12th, you are eligible for admission to Shivaji College. The admission process for Shivaji College is completely online. For undergraduate courses, admission is based on the marks scored in class 12t. The

faqs.question: What is the fees for Shivaji University admission?
faqs.answer: Shivaji fees is different depending on the programme and specialisation. Students can pay the fees through accepted payment gateway. The payment has to be done timely. The course fees is as below:CoursesTuition FeesBTechINR 51,400 - INR 5.5 lakhBDesINR 1.3 Lacs - INR 1.7 lakhMScINR 2,000 - INR 92,500BScINR 5,800 - INR 47,400MCAINR 42,000 - INR 2.2 lakhMBAINR 50,700 - INR 2.4 lakhNote: This is taken from official sources and can change.

faqs.question: What is the criteria to take admission in Shivaji University for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology?
faqs.answer:
Basic eligibility to secure admission for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology in Shivaji University is that candidate should have a minimum pass mark of 45% in class 12. Candidate must have passed 10+2 in Science stream.
Final year appearing candidates can also apply on provisional basis.
Those Candidates who belongs to other state will have to score minimum 55% marks in 10+2.
Final Selection
Candidates are selected based on Shivaji University entrance exam score and marks obtained in 10+2.
Selection parameters and weightage : 
Entrance Exam Score- 50%
10+2 exam score - 50%
Regards.

placement_data.title: Shivaji University Kolhapur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to NIRF report 2025, a total of 190 students were placed and 12 students were selected for higher studies out of total 239 students during Shivaji University UG 4-year placements 2024 . The median package received by UG 4-year students in 2024 was 3.3 LPA .

The median package recorded during Shivaji University placement 2024 for PG 2-year course was 2.4 LPA . In addition, 672 students were placed and 135 students were selected for higher studies out of 1193 graduating students in 2024.

Shivaji University JEE Main Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BE/BTech courses for all categories and rounds under the quota of All India. According to the closing cutoff of the last round, the rank fell between 17423 and 659665 for admission to various affiliated colleges for the General AI category. highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Shivaji University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #45 under State Public University category. Shivaji University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Shivaji University rankings is covered in the following article:

nirf.description:
Shivaji University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Shivaji University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Shivaji University climbed 6 ranks to #45 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Shivaji University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Shivaji University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 180 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 67 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is best and the faculty is also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: In college, Wi-Fi is available everywhere for all students, and classrooms are cleaned every day with machines.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shri Shahaji Chhatrapati MahavidyalayaReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Affordable fees, supportive staff, but average campus life.
reviews.review_text: I think facilities in my college were good. Clean water was available. Classroom and seperate library were available. There was no Wi-Fi. Quality of college canteen was good, and cheap food was available. Sports like kabbadi, kho-kho, and cricket were available. Medical facilities were very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in my living area, and the faculty is also very good.
reviews.review_text: The schedule is moderate, with around 5 to 15 lectures per week. The facilities are very good. Teaching was also very good, and the facilities include Wi-Fi in the departments. The average quality of the facilities in our hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food is good, available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also good in our college, and sports and games are well supported; there are separate periods for games and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Short review of WCE Sangli.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

reviews.review_heading: Not much recommended due to poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Average with quite natural diversity and good weather conditions as it is located outside Kolhapur city. You can enjoy Kolhapur city and its attractions more often. The college has good food culture and great festivals. Historically, the site is located near the city, which is an overall good city.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Huge green campus, helpful seniors, no ragging, clubs, competition, and respectful students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in library, classrooms, hostels, study room, and on campus too. Labs are conducted in their respective departments. College has very big campus with separate departments and an academic complex for classes and theory lectures. In hostel, we have 4 sharing rooms and 2 shared rooms for NRI. There are playground, jogging track, a mess, and gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and if you want this college for law, this college is very best for law.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is very good, and there are so many things and Wi-Fi all over hostel and college. We don't have lab; we have a moot court hall for the practice of hearing and judgment. All facilities in the hostel and mess are very good and food is like 5 star. Overall, all is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college for mechanical engineering in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The college mess and hostels are very good. Food in the college mess is good and hygienic. The college environment is also good. The campus is silent. College provides various facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and a well-structured library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a big and very clean campus. There are lots of trees present in the college campus thats why the college environment is very good and green. The college provides all facilities such as Wi-Fi, bus, canteen, etc. The college has a big ground for sports activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KIT College of Engineering, KolhapurReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is really a good college for engineering and MBA. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my department, there are fully ventilated classrooms. In all classrooms, there are digital screens from BenQ systems. All classrooms have different Wi-Fi connections. There are fully equipped 6 computer labs with computer systems. There are three different canteens that are well-facilitated. In my hostel, the rooms are clean and clear. A separate study room is available. There is a ground where you can play cricket, volleyball, football, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vasantidevi Patil Institute of Pharmacy, KodoliReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college of pharmacy in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a very good and large campus, and the college's buildings are also good. The college provides all facilities to the students, like Wi-Fi, drinking water, a good library, and classrooms that are also good. The college mess is good, and they will provide good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Government Medical College, MirajReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good institution, good teaching faculty, cultural event, has good facilities and a green campus.
reviews.review_text: Most of our college infrastructure is old, continuing from 1987 (established year), but renovations are going on in many departments. The hospital has many facilities that are required. About hostels, the actual condition is very bad, 4 people in a room, and buildings are very old, leakage and bathroom blockage occur on multiple floors. These need renovation. We have a central library that's new and a very study-focused place. Mess food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by D Y Patil College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: D Y Patil College is very good for those who want placement.
reviews.review_text: Every department has a special building, and there is a garden with some space for students. There are too many labs for every department, and our library is in a different building. Most students live in the hostel, which has a building and a mess. There is no ground for our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is so nice, you come here on a visit and see all over campus and the whole college.
reviews.review_text: Our department has decent classrooms, labs, campus Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean everyday with lots of workers. Mess food is average but hygienic, medical aid is available, and teachers help in my studies, and they provide all notes, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

review_content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

review_content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

courses.overview: Gautam Buddha University Courses & Fees 2025 There are multiple courses offered by Gautam Buddha University. review_summary.college_name: Gautam Buddha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.

content.Placements: In my course, B.Tech in computer science and engineering, placements are decent and above average. In my batch, around 40-50 percent of students have received a PPO till now from the college placement drive. The average package offered is 6 LPA, and the highest package offered is around 12 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. 70 percent of students got internships during the internship scheme. Full-stack web developer, software developer, and software engineer are the top roles offered by companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is a semi-government college.

content.Placements: Around 75 to 80 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in this course is 7 to 8 LPA, and the minimum package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in this course include HCL, Wipro, TCS, and Cognizant. Around 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from our course in companies like Wipro and others. The top roles offered in this course are Software Developer and App Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.

content.Placements: There is a GBU-ET exam that this university conducts for admission, and you can also take admission through JEE Main percentile. In GBU-ET, they ask 30 questions of each Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry at a moderate level. Average package is approximately 4-5 LPA. There are some top recruiting companies like Wipro, etc. 30-40% students get on-campus jobs, others off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

faqs.answer: The biggest transition for a student is to get promoted from high school to college. Students having huge stress for their new life chapters must learn the ways to prepare before stepping into it. There are various factors to help you in getting organized and build a strong foundation for your success. It range from searching academic support to developing strong interpersonal skills. There are some activities to do in your freshman year.College is more than continuing your education. Studying is important, but other activities are equally important to experience in this modern competitive world. You have four years of your graduation to engineering college, but there are some primary things that you can do as a freshman. It will help you to find the other opportunities during the rest of your college career. Along with the opportunities, the first year of the college provides the chance to face various challenges too. Here are some significant steps to get prepared for your freshman year.1. Get involved with Extra-curricular2. Research possible college major3. Read as much as possible in freshman year4. Create a study plan in freshman year5. Meet with your guidance counselor
faqs.question: What are some helpful tips for students starting their first year at Gautam Buddha University?

paragraphs: GBU Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

GBU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university considers national-level tests, but preference is given toGBU-ETcandidates. GBU-ET will be conducted at the various centres throughcomputer-based tests. The date will be published in advance before the examination. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below arepopular GBU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)

GBU feefor different programmes ranges between INR 20,000 and INR 10.8 lakh. The university provides 50% scholarships in tuition fees for students belonging to SC/ST categories. Also, GBU has the option to avail the relaxation of 50% of the fees for students securing more than 80% in Class 12 and admitted into BTech - Civil, Electrical and Mechanical Engineering. Find below the GBU tuition fees along with the average salary for some of the programmes:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

In any programme, the minimum number of students should be 15 or 50% of the total seat intake allocated to that programme. Students belonging to the Sport category can avail of the 5% relaxation in the respective qualifying examination. Seat reservation will be applicable as per the Government of U.P. and Gautam Buddha University. Find below the seat intake for popular programmes at GBU Noida:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

Gautam Buddha University admissions usually begin inApril. Generally, the GBU admission process includes steps including the registration process, merit list release, counselling, and admission fee payment. Candidates must start by applying for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to follow to get a seat in GBU Noida:
1. Application Process:

Candidates who wish to receive admission to GBU Noida must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and pay the required application fee (INR 1,500 for General and INR 750 for SC/ ST candidates belonging to UP).
2. Selection:

Once the registration process is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. The university selects candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such asGATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For programmes such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university releases the results ofGBU-ET online.
3. Admission Confirmation:

Selected candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. After the final selection is done, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about Gautam Buddha University check out the below videos:

courses_data.name: GBU Noida BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for GBU Noida BTech programme. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gautam Buddha University accepts JEE Main score for admission to BTech programme. The university also conducts GBU-ET for admission to BTech course. The exam is conducted in CBT mode. GBU-ET is conducted at designated centre. The date of exam and schedule is notified to candidates 15 days well in advance before the examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University BTech programme. Candidates need to complete three years/ two years Diploma exam with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants with BSc degree or DVoc can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech in Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University provides BTech programs requiring students to have passed 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects, plus Chemistry, Biotechnology, technical vocational subject. Minimum of 45% marks & 40% for SC/ST is required in these subjects combined. Admission is based on Gautam Buddha University Entrance Test or JEE Main scores.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to appear for the GBU entrance test?
faqs.answer: GBU admission in all UG, PG and doctoral courses is based on the GBU entrance test performance. However, candidates holding national-level test scores are also considered for admission, only if the seats remain vacant after GBU-ET.

courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics & Data Science and General. Aspirants need to complete graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for MBA course. The selection for MBA is based on GBU-ET score.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics & Data Science and General. Aspirants who have passed graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for MBA course. Admission to MBA course is based on GBU-ET score.

faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers admission to MA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Such candidates need to apply online for their course and wait for the selection confirmation. Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does Gautam Buddha University offer MA?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course divided into four semesters. The university offers MA in Journalism and Mass Communication, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. GBU offers direct admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for MA.

faqs.question: Can I join two programmes at Gautam Buddha University, GBU at a time?
faqs.answer: The curriculum of all its academic activities has an international and cross-cultural focus. At present, the school offers three programmes in management, which are Master in Business Administration (2-year full time), Dual Degree BBA + MBA (with existing option), B.Com (H)and Doctoral Programme.

faqs.question: Can foreign students also seek admission in GBU?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has made its presence globally and is open for admission in all UG, PG and doctoral programmes for foreign students. Some of the countries from where the students have taken admission since GBU’s inception are: Vietnam, Cambodia, Afghanistan, South Korea, Thailand, USA, etc.

Room, medical room/First aid box, visitor’s room, table tennis room, reading room, indoor games room, gymnasium, badminton court, volleyball court, basketball court etc.

One hostel for Married Research Scholars Hostel only for full time Ph. D. students consists of two room apartments having all necessary infrastructure.

Foreign nationals (married or unmarried) admitted students in various programs of the University are given priority for MRSH.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has a great and beautiful infrastructure, which is spread over 511 acres. It has facilities like a shopping complex and multiple cafes on campus. There are multiple playgrounds for different outdoor sports like cricket, football, and courts for lawn tennis. There is a separate indoor stadium for badminton, and other indoor sports are also available. Hostel provides single non-sharing and personal rooms with 24x7 electricity and internet connection through LAN. Mess food quality is good and hy...

reviews.review_heading: This is a semi-government college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

reviews.review_heading: Nice College and this college is semi government .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is best Wi-Fi are also working properly benches are also comfortable library is nice but classroom is also nice neat and clean in hostel there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, medical facilities are also available they are also concentrate on sport.

reviews.review_heading: A little bit expensive, but a nice college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is working properly, but the lab chair is not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classroom is not perfect, it's a hostel, and there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indore games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a little bit expensive for this course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is also working properly. Labs and chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but classrooms are not perfect. In the hostel, there are all facilities like AC and Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is quite good and study is above average, and its study depends on students.
reviews.review_text: Gautam Buddha University campus is good and spacious, but the management of the campus is poor. All sports facilities are there: volleyball, badminton, cricket, tennis, etc. Tournaments are held for volleyball, cricket, and all. It is a very big university, so it helps the students to walk and feel relaxed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Computer Science and Technology (ICST Varanasi)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are not very good, and the infrastructure and facilities are also average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not very good. They are above average. Labs, libraries, and classrooms are too big, and air conditioning is available in every class. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is good. Sports and games also take place on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Gbuian are the best in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are also available via LAN, and the library is available for free in my college. the hostel is very well furnished, and the quality of food is very good, as a company from Gurgaon prepares food for students with the menu changing every week. Medical facilities, like a dispensary, are available in the college, and sports facilities, such as a stadium, are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to take admission in CSE course for 2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in our college. Our college has different buildings for all departments, as it offers many different courses. Hostels in our college are also the best among the range of colleges in Greater Noida.

reviews.review_heading: GBU is the college for GBUians.
reviews.review_text: The department is very well-maintained and furnished. Wi-Fi facility and the library are available for free. Classrooms are well-equipped, and decorum is maintained. Hostels are very well-furnished and have LAN facilities. The food is not that good, but considering the price, it is worth it. A free medical dispensary is available. Sports facilities are top-notch, and a stadium is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Gautam Buddha University review.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is the best. College has 511 acres of land. Our college is very big. We have Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms have AC. Library is also very big in every department. Classrooms are fully AC. Facilities in hostel are not good for first year. Hostel is good but for second year hostel is literally the worst you can't pee and use washrooms. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Because government institute of medical sciences hospital is our college so medical facility is good. M...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. In the hostel everything is good. Everyone has a separate room but there is no proper Wi-Fi. There is a LAN port and the quality of the food which we got is okay sometimes we get good goes sometimes not. Medical facilities are good. There is a nearby gym. Sports and games are good.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at GNDU include BSc (Hons), MSc, BTech & LLM, among others. After doing BSc, students can have a career in IT, Software Development etc. GNDU also has a Directorate of Open & Distance Learning (ODL) located at its main campus for distance & open programmes. By doing various courses from Guru Nanak Dev University, students can get job offers from top recruiters like Amazon, Accenture, Axis Bank etc.
In addition to this, Guru Nanak Dev University offers UG, PG, diploma, short-term, & certificate programmes across various fields eg Engineering, Science, Law, Arts & Humanities, Commerce & Accounting, Computers & IT, Management, Journalism, Architecture & Pharmacy, among others. Candidates can check the Guru Nanak Dev University course admissions details along with the eligibility criteria & the total course fee in the following table:

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: No placement, affordable.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the college. 30% of students get jobs by themselves. There are no big companies. No internship is provided by the college. This college is not for placement. It is only for getting a degree. In Science, we only get knowledge of Science theoretically.
content.Infrastructure: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements for the BCA course are okay and mostly depend on how much effort a student puts in. Around 40-50% of students get placed, and many find jobs on their own. The average salary is around 2-3 LPA. Internships are also available in small IT companies, and common roles are IT support, junior developer, and customer support.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,

content.Placements: The placement cell was a huge add-on to my career path. They instantly initiated the process of the placement and related stuff when I entered my 2nd last semester of the curriculum. They provided us companies for internships and full-time placements and introduced us to companies that are dream companies for many. Many companies come on campus, including local companies of the state, Byjus, Wipro, TCS, Amazon, Datalog, etc. The company with the highest package offers 14 Lacs. If you sit in placement, a minimum of 7.5 CGPA is required, and there were different criteria for placement.

paragraphs: GNDU admissionto all courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university offers courses at UG, PG, and doctorate levels. Additionally, students can also pursue certificate courses at the university. Programmes offered atGNDUare in streams including –Engineering,Architecture& Planning,IT & Software,Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education, Science, and Law. The application process for the university is conducted online. Students seeking admission to the programmes offered at the university can read the following article to know the detailed process of theGNDU admission procedure.

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) admissionto some courses is ongoing. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple specialisations through its constituent colleges. Guru Nanak Dev University course admissionis both entrance and merit-based depending on the programme selected by the students. Each aspirant must meet the course-specific eligibility requirements to be eligible for the course admission at the university. Candidates can pursue a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations in a variety of fields at the university. The university accepts various national-level entrance tests. Furthermore, it also conducts its own entrance test for admission to some of the courses. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularGNDU courses:

Guru Nanak Dev University feesvary for each course and specialisation. The university charges multiple components from the students such as admission fees, tuition fees, security deposits etc. GNDU students are required to pay the amount either semester-wise or annually, depending on the course selected. Interested candidates can check out the below table forGNDU course feesin the table below:
Check out completeGNDU Fee Structure
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar seatintakevaries for each course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the selection rounds. Candidates must pay the admission fee to secure their seat at the university. Students can look at the table below to know course-wiseGNDU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes.
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

As per the information available on the official website of the University,GNDU admissionto various courses is either based on merit or an entrance exam, depending on the course selected. Foradmission to the BTechcourse, aspirants have to appear forJEE Main entranceand admission to the MBA course candidates are required to appear for theGNDU Management Entrance Test (GMET). For all courses, admission is done based on the merit secured by the candidates in the entrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department. Candidates seeking admission to GNDU courses must begin their admission process by filling out the application form before the deadline. The step-wiseGNDU admission processis given in the table below:
Step 1: GNDU application process
Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay the application fees before the deadline.
Step 2: GNDU Selection Process

Admission to most of theGNDU courses is entrance-based. Only for diploma-level courses, the admission criteria is merit-based. Applicants applying to BTech and MBA courses are required to appear forJEE Main and GMET,respectively, to get shortlisted for admission. Apart from BTech and MBA, the University shortlists candidates based on theentrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department.
Step 3: GNDU Merit list and Admission confirmation

After completing the selection process,GNDU releasesa course-wise merit list on its official website. All the candidates, whose name is on the merit list, are required to appear for the counselling/ interview process for seat allocation and document verification process.

faqs.question: When are BCom admissions open at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University usually starts accepting applications for BCom admission in the month of May every year. The exact admission dates may vary across the GNDU-affiliated colleges. The admission process is usually conducted by July. As the eligibility criteria for BCom admission at GNDU is based on the Class 12 merit of the applicants, it can be said that candidates seeking admission must apply soon after their Class 12 result is declared.

courses_data.name: GNDU MBA/PGDM Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) MBAis offered with multiple specialisation options such asFinance,HRM,Marketing, etc. The University Business School and the University School of Financial Studies offer the MBA course.GNDUMBA admission is based on merit in theGuru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). Selected candidates are allotted seats through counselling. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any stream from a recognised University are eligible to apply for admission atGNDU MBA. More highlights related toGNDU MBAare mentioned below:

faqs.question: How can I take admission in GNDU to pursue MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to GNDU MBA programmes need to take the Guru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). The university shortlist candidates based on exam score. The selected candidates have to participate in the counselling during which the final seat allotment is carried out. Moreover, to apply for the entrance exam, candidates can visit the official website of Guru Nanak Dev University.

faqs.question: How will I know if I have been shortlisted for GNDU GMET counselling?
faqs.answer: The University will release a merit list of candidates selected for the counselling round on its official website soon after the declaration of GNDU GMET result. The shortlisted candidates will have to appear at the university main campus for interview rounds along with the required documents. Candidates must report at the alloted date and time, failing which candidate's request for change in date and time will not be entertained.

faqs.question: When will GNDU GMET registrations commence?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University conducts GMET for admission to Management courses offered at its Main and regional campuses. The university usually opens registration for GMET in May and closes by second week of July. The exam is usually conducted in July every year in online mode for 150 minutes.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in GNDU without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, for some course, GNDU takes admission without entrance exam. The admission to those courses is allotted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.Admission to following GNDU courses is based on merit in the qualifying exam:UG CoursesPG coursesBTech (Urban &Regional Planning)MEdBachelor of Tourism & Travel Management .PG Diploma in Mental Health CounselingBAPG Diploma in TranslationBScMCom, MSc MathematicsBPTMBA, MCA, MSc (IT), MSc (Maths), MA (Eco), MA Punjabi, MCom

faqs.question: How much percentage required for GNDU?
faqs.answer: Minimum percentage for GNDU admission in some popular courses are:CoursesEligibilityBE/BTechClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)MBA/PGDMClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)UG DiplomaClass 12BScClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BCAClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BComClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)

faqs.question: Which entrance test score is accepted by Guru Nanak Dev University for BCom?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. To appear for this exam, candidates must fill out an application form on the official website of the university. Based on the performance in this exam, a merit list is prepared. The applicants who manage to get shortlisted are allotted seats, provided they present the require documents supporting their eligibillity.

placement_data.title: Guru Nanak Dev University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Guru Nanak Dev University has released the salary details for the batch passed out in 2025. The highest package secured by batch 2025 was INR 44 LPA , while the average package offered during GNDU placements 2025 was INR 6.37 LPA . The University has placed 84.89% students in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Guru Nanak Dev University in 2025 include Amazon, Accenture, Coca Cola, Capgemini, Dabur, IBM, etc.

Earlier, 652 students were placed during the 2024 placement session. The highest and average packages stood at INR 18.43 LPA and INR 6.40 LPA , respectively. KPMG, Accenture, Nucleus Software were among the few top recruiters of GNDU.

faqs.question: Is GNDU good for placement?
faqs.answer: A total of 79 companies offered job opportunities to the students passing out in 2024. The highest package stood at INR 18.43 LPA and the average package offered was INR 6.40 LPA. Check the complete insights of Guru Nanak Dev University placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 652 Highest package INR 18.43 LPA Average package INR 6.40 LPA No. of companies offered jobs 79

faqs.question: How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?
faqs.answer: The University has released the overall placement data on its official website. From 2022 to 2024, the number of students placed has declined year-on-year. On the other hand, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the number of companies that offered job opportunities. Refer to the table below for a detailed analysis of GNDU placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 993 875 652 No. of companies offered jobs 88 61 79

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the 2024 passing-out batch was INR 18.43 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 19.57 LPA. Looking at the past three years' statistics, declining trend was recorded in the Guru Nanak Dev University the highest package, which is depicted below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 44 LPA INR 19.57 LPA INR 18.43 LPA

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University can lead to bright career opportunities in various sectors. The career prospects primarily depend on a variety of factors such as, chosen specialisation, preferred sector, skills of the graudates, etc. The university offers a BSc in various specialisations. BSc graduates of the university can build careers in the fields of education, IT, healthcare, research, etc. For better career prospects after a BSc , graduates can pursue higher education with courses like MS, MSc or MBA.

highlights.description: GNDU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #12 by the India Today 2025 under the University (Government) category. It ranked #77 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The GNDU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
GNDU is consistently recognized as one of the top institutes across all major categories by NIRF 2023. It has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2023, GNDU fell 7 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, GNDU fell 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. In the 'University' category, GNDU ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Students can refer to the table below for the GNDU NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
GNDU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 43 ranks to #329 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 9 ranks to #77 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
There are two messes and two canteens in the hostel and both are run on a contract basis. There are some indoor games facilities like table tennis, carom board, volleyball and two badminton courts are also available within the premises of the hostel for the students. The students have access to the internet through Wi-Fi in all the rooms. Girls hostel is well-equipped with facilities like the internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photo state, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. 
Local students from within a radius of 40 kilometres (25 kilometres in case of girls), evening students, employees and part-time students are not eligible for admission to the hostel.
facilities: Holds approximately 543,357 documents, including books, bound journals, theses, reports and manuscripts.
Subscribes to about 134 Indian journals, 52 foreign journals, and 24 newspapers, and has acquired over 15,600 e‑books.
Rare and manuscript collections include around 5,174 rare books and 1,511 manuscripts.

library.description:
The library remains open on all the days of the year except on two National Holidays i.e. 26th January and 15th August. It opens from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays and 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekends and other holidays. 
Bhai Gurdas Library is subscribing 87 Foreign and 146 Indian Journals. In addition to it, a library is also receiving about 150 journals as a gift. The library is a member of INFLIBNET which is providing access to 15,000+ e-journals and six databases. The library is also subscribing more than 200 journals through IEEE. It have 1,516 rare manuscripts relating to Punjab History, Culture, Sikh Religion and other faiths. There are 22 departmental libraries also for the convenience of the students and teachers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Handball Court, Softball Court, Kho- Kho, Kabbadi, Hockey stadium, Archery, Velodrome
