reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Saroop Rani Government College For WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: No placement, affordable.
reviews.review_text: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Teg Bahadur College, SathialaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think this college can be improved with some changes.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Lyallpur Khalsa CollegeReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDUReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,
reviews.review_text: It was a very good course to learn about programming languages; they were very focused on practicals so we could learn effectively. Every month, they hold special sessions so students can share their innovative ideas, giving the basic and advanced knowledge of C, C++, Java, JavaScript, MySQL, etc. In the first two semesters, basic knowledge of computers is given along with the main course. Hostel facilities were available at reasonable charges, and the room sizes were good. The food was hygienic...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: They conduct less interactive classes, which are so boring.
reviews.review_text: Only the exact number of students is admitted to all the courses to lessen the crowd and to improve the performance. Sports and other physical activities are scheduled only once a week. There are certain liberties in hostel premises and other things. We visit the library only during free periods and break hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Baring Union Christian CollegeReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are well-qualified, but placement through this college seems next to impossible.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. It is good enough to stay focused. Surroundings are also clean and tidy. There are no issues with the infrastructure because the classrooms are spacious. Moreover, the library also has a large volume of books in every niche.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility was available. The library was also present. Modern classroom and computer labs. Hostel quality was also good. All essential amenities were available in the college. Sports and games were encouraged by the University.

reviews.review_heading: MBA at GNDU: Fees, placement and faculty overview.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent for the course and hostel. Adequate lighting, ventilation and fans are available in classrooms and hostel rooms. The department also has Wi-Fi and projectors for students and teachers. There are ramps for wheelchairs as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Amritsar Group of CollegesReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life, hostel life was good, but some of the teachers were so rude.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and structures are normal, not that good and not too bad. It's like okay. Wi-Fi is available at every point in the college. Labs are there, but not for agriculture students because they don't have permission to pursue this course now.

reviews.review_heading: University for Punjabis only.
reviews.review_text: Superb infrastructure for sports. I am cutting a star because of the hostel. Hostels are not well-maintained, but otherwise, the grounds and libraries are top class. They provide various facilities to students, such as a gym, pool, etc. Many canteens are not so good, and the mess is very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Golden Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average but good enough for daily classes. Labs had the basic equipment we needed, and Wi-Fi worked most of the time. Classrooms were clean and comfortable. The library was helpful, but it needed more updated books. Hostel rooms were okay, and the food was manageable. Sports and medical facilities were simple but useful when required.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of extra curricular activities like - shooting, swimming, etc.
reviews.review_text: Neat and clean hostel and good infrastructure. Hostel rooms are good and neat and clean. Washrooms are clean. There is also a lift in the hostel. Food in the mess is nice and can be eaten. There are many shops in the hostel where we get all our necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our department is good, and many more departments, such as UBS, Agriculture, and the UIT department, have better infrastructure. Moreover, we have a health centre on our campus which includes great and experienced doctors and helpful staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good Engineering College .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course was extremely good. Wi-Fi was available in the college. Labs were well-equipped with instruments. Library was present in the campus. Hostel was also good it's has water cooler, decent washrooms.

data.description: Guru Nank Dev University has an experienced faculty who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. GNDU also invites faculty for guest lectures and let students interact with renowned personalities. Most of the faculty members working at GNDU are doctorates.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Guru Nanak Dev University

likes.text: Many companies visited our university to hire students, and some of them are Nagarro, Software AG, TCS, Infogain, Chickmick, TT Consultants, etc.
The placements in this particular campus are good, and students get appropriate exposure and experience during their study to clear various interview rounds.

college_info.college_name: Mahindra University Hyderabad: Courses, Fees, Admissions 2026, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary: Mahindra University admissions 2026 are open for various courses. Candidates can visit the official website for the latest updates. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Mahindra University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. The 4-year full-time BTech programme and the BSc students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Dell, Amazon, IBM, and others. BTech and BSc students can become Managers, Consultants, and Engineers, or can go for other non-technical streams. BTech students are taught subjects such as Introduction to Electrical Engineering, English, Media Project, and others. The BTech CSE course covers the basic and advanced levels of Algorithms, Database Management systems, Data Structures, Machine Learning, Cryptography, and others. Overall, it is one of the top universities offering quality education to students.
Candidates can check the Mahindra University popular programmes, along with the eligibility, and fee structure in the table below:
Check the video below to find a detailed review of BTech courses at Mahindra University:

placements.overview: Mahindra University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. The 4-year full-time BTech programme and the BSc students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Dell, Amazon, IBM, and others. BTech and BSc students can become Managers, Consultants, and Engineers, or can go for other non-technical streams. BTech students are taught subjects such as Introduction to Electrical Engineering, English, Media Project, and others. The BTech CSE course covers the basic and advanced levels of Algorithms, Database Management systems, Data Structures, Machine Learning, Cryptography, and others. Overall, it is one of the top universities offering quality education to students.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the college accepts the JEE Exam but the basic requirement for doing B.Tech is 10+2. The students who have completed their 10+2 with a minimum aggregate of 60% and have qualified with PCM as their main subject are eligible. It is also cumpulsirt to clear the JEE Mains exam and should also be eligible for JEE Advanced. The college also has its entrance examinations for the students. Mahindra University also considers the score of the SAT Exam to gain admission to the B.Tech course. So, it is essential to take JEE Exam.
faqs.question: Does Mahindra University, Hyderabad accept JEE for B.Tech courses?

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Applied Economics and Finance - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A well all-rounded university great for personal and professional growth.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors were the first to be placed. They are still in the final stages of the placement cycle. There is an average of 8 Lacs and the highest of 32 Lacs so far for the BBA batch. Big 4 was a major recruiter. Most of the roles were in the hiring department and finance.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is great. There is a great variety of food catering to all, including vegetarian and Jains. Facilities are modern and up to date. The taste is very good with a weekly change in the menu. Medical facilities are good. There are nearby restaurants and hospitals catering to needs that may arise any time.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Decent placements are available after course completion.

review_content.Placements: As far as I have experienced, the placement report for our college shows that around 80-90% of the students get placements, and the rest still look for jobs or opt for higher studies. Up to 50 companies visit the campus for placements. The highest package offered by the college is 24 LPA, the average package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA. Internships are also offered to students from the beginning of the second year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college are pretty good. The facilities available in our college include smart classrooms, sports facilities mainly related to indoor sports, and a medical room. The hostels have decent facilities, and the mess offers good quality food.

review_summary.college_name: Mahindra University Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and worth joining.

content.Placements: The average package is 6 LPA. Top companies visit the college to hire people. Students with good knowledge will be placed in better positions. Every year many students get passed out with good packages. Students can choose whatever company they want to work with.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is so huge and surrounded by trees. Classrooms are good, and a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility is available. Hostel rooms are so good. Washrooms are clean. There is a Fifa-verified football ground, swimming pool, basketball court, tennis court, etc. Mess food is so good. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Nanotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely crazy college.

content.Placements: Mahindra University provides good placements and you are guaranteed to be placed in a good company. Mahindra is tied up with big companies and the average package is 10 lakhs per annum with the highest package being 45 lakhs per annum. Your placement depends on your academic performance. The top recruiting companies are Amazon Intel Tech Mahindra and BYJU'S.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my Nano technology course is good with well equipped classrooms and labs. The hostel facilities are also good with comfortable cottages and a well stocked library. The mess serves good quality food and there's a clinic on campus with a certified doctor. The total cost of my course is 4.5 Lacs per annum, and the hostel fee is 2 Lacs per annum.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Applied Economics and Finance - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A well all-rounded university great for personal and professional growth.

content.Placements: Our seniors were the first to be placed. They are still in the final stages of the placement cycle. There is an average of 8 Lacs and the highest of 32 Lacs so far for the BBA batch. Big 4 was a major recruiter. Most of the roles were in the hiring department and finance.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is great. There is a great variety of food catering to all, including vegetarian and Jains. Facilities are modern and up to date. The taste is very good with a weekly change in the menu. Medical facilities are good. There are nearby restaurants and hospitals catering to needs that may arise any time.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements are available after course completion.

content.Placements: As far as I have experienced, the placement report for our college shows that around 80-90% of the students get placements, and the rest still look for jobs or opt for higher studies. Up to 50 companies visit the campus for placements. The highest package offered by the college is 24 LPA, the average package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA. Internships are also offered to students from the beginning of the second year.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college are pretty good. The facilities available in our college include smart classrooms, sports facilities mainly related to indoor sports, and a medical room. The hostels have decent facilities, and the mess offers good quality food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a practical-based course curriculum with decent placements.

content.Placements: Your college has a dedicated placement cell, but only 40-50 companies visit the campus for student placements. Approximately 80% of students in our course secure placements. The median package offered by the college is 6 LPA. Internships are offered, and students with good academics and skills have the opportunity to intern at Mahindra. Other recruiting companies include HTC, TCS, Amazon, Capgemini, IBM, and various startups in Hyderabad.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not very large but offers many facilities. There are sports grounds where we can play cricket, football, volleyball, tennis, etc. A medical room is available for treatment. CCTV cameras are installed in classrooms and labs. Cafeterias serve good-quality food.

courses_data.description: Mahindra University BBA admission is ongoing on the official website of the university. Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) is a three-year undergraduate degree in the management field. The basic eligibility is pass Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream. Interested candidates also need to apply online by visiting the college official website. Check out to know more about Mahindra University BBA courses:

faqs.question: What is the fee for four-year BBA course at Mahindra University?
faqs.answer: The college offers BBA in a full-time mode. The total four-year fee of BBA is INR 12 lakh. To be eligible for admission, applicants are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, to get a seat at college candidates are required to pay the fees annually.

faqs.question: What are the selection criteria for BBA at Mahindra University?
faqs.answer: Mahindra University offers entrance-based admission to BBA. To be eligible for admission candidates must pass Class 12 from a recognised board. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates must apply online for admission.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to various courses at Mahindra University?
faqs.answer: Mahindra University admissions are open for all courses. The university offers merit-based admission to all UG, PG, and Doctoral courses. Further, for admission to BTech, candidates are required to appear in one entrance exam i.e. JEE Main and SAT accepted by the college. Candidates seeking admission to Mahindra University must fill out the online application form by visiting the university's official website.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required for MBA at Mahindra University 2023?
faqs.answer: Mahindra University does not look for a minimum marks. They put more focus on the consistency of the student in their bachelor's degree, done in a recognised board/university, hence they ask for a detailed report submission during application, if your marks in your bachelor's degree takes an upward graph, that also works in your favour.They also ask for your grades in standardized exams, GMAT, CAT and GRE.

faqs.question: Does Mahindra University accept SAT score for admission to BA?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mahindra University accepts SAT score for admission to the BA programme, the basic eligibility criteria for admission to BA is Class 12th from a recognised board or equivalent. Provided, the SAT scores are not mandatory for BA admissions.

placement_data.title: Mahindra University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Mahindra University has not released its University level placement report for 2025. Mahindra University has released its 2025 placement highlights for its School of Management. The highest and average package recorded during Mahindra University MBA placements 2025 was INR 16 LPA and INR 11 LPA , respectively. A total of 28 recruiters took part in the Mahindra University MBA placement season and provided roles across various sectors.

Mahindra University placement highlights for 2024 have been released. The highest and average package offered to the students during the recent placement drive was INR 40 LPA and INR 9.1 LPA, respectively. Further, 48 companies participated in the Mahindra University placements 2024.

As per NIRF 2025, the institute has been ranked #101-150 under the Engineering category. The institute is well known for its excellent academic offerings and top faculty. Candidates can go through the following to know more details around Mahindra University, Hyderabad rankings.

rankings.highlight: 6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Hyderabad In 2025

Mahindra University, Hyderabad has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. hostel_campus.college_name: Mahindra University Hyderabad Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: A digital and physical library with vast resources, journals, and e-books to support student learning and research.
A digital and physical library with vast resources, journals, and e-books to support student learning and research.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and worth joining.
reviews.review_text: Campus is so huge and surrounded by trees. Classrooms are good, and a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility is available. Hostel rooms are so good. Washrooms are clean. There is a Fifa-verified football ground, swimming pool, basketball court, tennis court, etc. Mess food is so good. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely crazy college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my Nano technology course is good with well equipped classrooms and labs. The hostel facilities are also good with comfortable cottages and a well stocked library. The mess serves good quality food and there's a clinic on campus with a certified doctor. The total cost of my course is 4.5 Lacs per annum, and the hostel fee is 2 Lacs per annum.

reviews.review_heading: A well all-rounded university great for personal and professional growth.
reviews.review_text: Everything is great. There is a great variety of food catering to all, including vegetarian and Jains. Facilities are modern and up to date. The taste is very good with a weekly change in the menu. Medical facilities are good. There are nearby restaurants and hospitals catering to needs that may arise any time.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements are available after course completion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our college are pretty good. The facilities available in our college include smart classrooms, sports facilities mainly related to indoor sports, and a medical room. The hostels have decent facilities, and the mess offers good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: It's a practical-based course curriculum with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not very large but offers many facilities. There are sports grounds where we can play cricket, football, volleyball, tennis, etc. A medical room is available for treatment. CCTV cameras are installed in classrooms and labs. Cafeterias serve good-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Two students share a single room. Air-conditioners and two fans are available in the rooms. Wi-Fi is available. The quality of the food in the mess is excellent. They serve a variety of food. The library is good and huge. Many books are available. Labs are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the difficulty of exams but our campus has good environment.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Wi-Fi is enabled on campus. Air-conditioners are available in the hostel and college. Library is very good and classrooms are spacious. Around 200 students can sit comfortably in our classrooms. The food served in the mess is better. Medical facilities are also available. Games are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The amount of supplementary exam is too high, i.e. 5k.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms are very neat and they can accommodate upto 100 students and in some classrooms upto 200.
The Physics and electrical labs have all equipments working and they are in good numbers. The hostel rooms are spacious and clean. The mess food is hygienic and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Wi-Fi facilities are very good with a very good connection. The food served in the mess and canteen is very hygienic. A variety of food is served. The hospital is open 24X7. There are many sports, including basketball, cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, chess, pool, and table tennis. There are also two gyms open to all.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahindra University.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The classrooms are very spacious and are air-conditioned. The college has big lecture halls. The college hostels are well maintained and have a good environment. There are labs for the students as well. There is also a library which has all the necessary books required by students.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the mess is excellent. Our college has all facilities that students would require like, basketball courts, football field, table tennis, gym, volleyball courts, snooker room, etc. It also provides the infrastructure for research and engineering for working on drones, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Mahindra university has the best hostels. It's worth the money. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good. The mess is thoroughly maintained. We also have a gym, basketball courts, volleyball court, cricket ground, badminton courts, tennis courts, and a big football ground. We also have a small clinic.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is average and our college is a good platform to perceive higher studies.
reviews.review_text: All courses in our college are provided with materials needed in the library, labs, Wi-Fi on campus, and dorms. We have a clinic for medical situations and ambulance in case of emergencies. The hostel room is shared by only 2 people with attached bathroom for girls and common washroom for boys. The food and security is very good. We have various indoor and outdoor sports such as football, tennis, cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good if students could not make it to IITs.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in this college. Mess is good and it is a way far better than any other hostels. It provides a library lawn and classes are very well maintained. Wi-Fi is not that well maintained but can be sufficient for a normal user. A lot of variety of e-books and offline books are also provided in the library.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Mahindra University is very good compared to all the EAMCET colleges. The hostels are also kept clean and tidy. The food is average. Sports facilities and medical facilities are excellent. The classrooms and labs are well maintained.

college_info.college_name: Artemisia College of Art and Design: Courses, Fees, Admissions 2025, Placements

highlights.summary: Artemisia College of Art and Design admissions 2025 are open for all courses. Students can apply for the respective courses by visiting the official website of the college.

table.details: Raja Mansingh Tomar Music & Art University (a Govt. of Madhya Pradesh University)

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Artemisia College of Art and Design include BDes and BFA. BDes is offered across various specialisations such as Animation, Game Design, Interior Design and Fashion Design. On the other hand, BFA is offered across two specialisations, namely Painting and Sculpture. Students can check the popular programmes offered at Artemisia College of Art and Design in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

faqs.answer: A:    The college has a dedicated placement criteria. All the students fulfilling the criteria to be eligible for college placement/internships get placed. the highest salary offered for internships is INR 80,000 per month. Starting salary for final placement ranges from INR 3LPA to 12 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Artemisia College of Art and Design?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Artemisia College of Art and Design offers undergraduate, diploma and certificate levels courses to students. These programmes are offered across varied specialisations such as Animation, Game Design, Interior Design, Photography and more. Students can check the Artemisia College of Art and Design courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Artemisia College of Art & Design (ACAD), established in 2014, is one of the top-notch colleges in India and it is affiliated with Raja Man Singh Tomar Music & Art University. ACAD ranks best amongst all the Animation and Graphic Design colleges in the state and is the only design college in the country to have its own Animation and Game Production Studio – ACAD Studios. The college offers 14 UG, certification, and Diploma programs under 6 disciplines namely Animation & VFX, Game Design & Development, Interior Design, Fashion Design, Painting, and Photography. The most popular course of ACAD is the 4-year B.Design course across 4 specializations.For admission in all its all the courses they take ACAD Entrance Exam and they can give this exam by paying Rs. 1000/- as the online admission test fee and after that they can take admission in it. Also, students can apply for early admission by submitting their creative work (portfolio). Their work will be evaluated upon submission. If approved, the student will not have to give the ACAD Entrance Test & will be granted admission after personal interview. If the student’s work is not approved, he/she can still sit for the ACAD Entrance Test
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Artemisia College of Art and Design accept for admission to B.Des?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Animation and VFX - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is good. Management is bad. Faculty members are great.

review_content.Placements: My college doesn't provide direct placements to companies. But companies give offers to our known faculty members. I don't know exactly the highest and the lowest. But I heard from the receptionist that the highest package is 1.5 LPA. The lowest is minimum Rs 20,000 - Rs 30,000 depending upon the level of skill have. Internships are mostly provided by their own research students. I think college doesn't give any flavour to internships. I don't know much about the animation industry. I think starting is your junior artist, and then you become a senior artist and as goes on.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Animation and VFX - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Artemisia College - Good and bad.

review_content.Placements: College placements are not that great as it is a private college. But still, there are a few students who get campus placements in their 4th year. Package prices are not that high. There are some at 3.5 LPA as I heard. The highest package went up to 12 LPA which isn't saying it usually happens, it's a rare of the rarest case.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has free Wi-Fi which is not that bad throughout campus. Classrooms have AC, and we have a gaming room with PS and PCs. There is also a hostel in the partner college which is pretty decent with good staff and food. Canteen I will say not the worst but still only a few items are good.

faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Des at Artemisia College of Art and Design?

faqs.answer: Artemisia College of Art & Design (ACAD), established in 2014, is one of the top-notch colleges in India and it is affiliated with Raja Man Singh Tomar Music & Art University. ACAD ranks best amongst all the Animation and Graphic Design colleges in the state and is the only design college in the country to have its own Animation and Game Production Studio – ACAD Studios. The college offers 14 UG, certification, and Diploma programs under 6 disciplines namely Animation & VFX, Game Design & Development, Interior Design, Fashion Design, Painting, and Photography. The most popular course of ACAD is the 4-year B.Design course across 4 specializations.For admission in all its all the courses they take ACAD Entrance Exam and they can give this exam by paying Rs. 1000/- as the online admission test fee and after that they can take admission in it. Also, students can apply for early admission by submitting their creative work (portfolio). Their work will be evaluated upon submission. If approved, the student will not have to give the ACAD Entrance Test & will be granted admission after personal interview. If the student’s work is not approved, he/she can still sit for the ACAD Entrance Test

review_summary.college_name: Artemisia College of Art and Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Game Design and Development - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you are considering ACAD for game design, it offers a solid foundation.

content.Placements: Companies like Ubisoft, Rockster, and EA have recruited from ACAD. Average packages range from Rs 30,000 per month to 6 LPA with top offers reaching 12 LPA. Roles include storyboard, artist, animator, game developer, and assistant designer. They also have ACAD studios, paid internships, freelancing opportunities, and real-world projects.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is small but well-utilized with modern classrooms and labs. There is no playground or large open space so events are held off campus. Internet connectivity can be unstable at times. Hostel is clean and well-maintained rooms are available. There is full-time security facility. Wi-Fi is available. Housekeeping, laundry, and food service are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Animation and VFX - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I enjoy the supportive environment here that encourages both learning and creativity.

content.Placements: 90% of students get placed at good companies with high packages starting from Rs. 30,000 per month to more. Companies like Reliance and Sony visit the college to recruit students. Many students get internships from placements. Roles like a storyboard artist, animator, game developer, etc., are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: We have good classrooms, with facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms with a lightbox for classical animation and many such facilities. We have good Wi-Fi, good food, a spacious clean room, and attached washrooms in the hostel. The college offers modern design studios and labs with industry-standard software, helping students bring their ideas to life with the latest technology, and teaches software like Maya, photoshop, blender, Adobe Animate- flash, etc. Regular exhibitions, design contests, and cultural events like IGDC and gaming conferences allow students to showcase their talents and gain confidence in their work.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Animation and VFX - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is good. Management is bad. Faculty members are great.

content.Placements: My college doesn't provide direct placements to companies. But companies give offers to our known faculty members. I don't know exactly the highest and the lowest. But I heard from the receptionist that the highest package is 1.5 LPA. The lowest is minimum Rs 20,000 - Rs 30,000 depending upon the level of skill have. Internships are mostly provided by their own research students. I think college doesn't give any flavour to internships. I don't know much about the animation industry. I think starting is your junior artist, and then you become a senior artist and as goes on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Animation and VFX - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: As a 3rd-year animation student, the highest salary package offered is above 40 LPA . The recruiting companies are Technicolor, Zynga, Rockstar, Ubisoft, etc. Internships are offered from 2nd-year based on your choice.
content.Infrastructure: There's a projector in each class. Labs are big and Wi-Fi is available with high speed of 5G. One need to have own laptop. One should check food quality before staying in a hostel. There is a library, but it is only equipped with books related to Business.

placement_data.title: Artemisia College of Art and Design Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official website of ACAD Indore, Artemisia College of Art and Design has maintained exceptional and consistent placement record over the years with students getting lucrative salary package in leading studios, production and design houses across the country.

Artemisia College is one of the leading design colleges that has its own Game Production and Animation studio where real-time work is done to produce games, TV series and movies. Other than this, students of Artemisia College of Art and Design have the option to work part-time in the production studios to learn and earn after second year of their degree courses. Further, students of BDes Fashion Design and BDes Interior Design are able to work on real-world projects where they not only get paid but also learn the necessary skills to excel in the professional world.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Artemisia College of Art and Design?
faqs.answer: The college has a dedicated placement criteria. All the students fulfilling the criteria to be eligible for college placement/internships get placed. the highest salary offered for internships is INR 80,000 per month. Starting salary for final placement ranges from INR 3LPA to 12 LPA.

We have good Wi-Fi, good food, a spacious clean room, and attached washrooms in the hostel. The college offers modern design studios and labs with industry-standard software, helping students bring their ideas to life with the latest technology, and teaches software like Maya, photoshop, blender, Adobe Animate- flash, etc. Regular exhibitions, design contests...

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Management is bad. Faculty members are great.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are good. Everything is cleaned up every two or three hours. Hygiene is maintained and classrooms look nice. But there is always construction work going on. Wi-Fi facility is available with little bit problems. Classrooms and labs are good. Library is also good. My hostel provides standard living with proper homemade cook. Our college has a canteen, but its price is little bit high.

reviews.review_heading: Artemisia College - Good and bad.
reviews.review_text: College has free Wi-Fi which is not that bad throughout campus. Classrooms have AC, and we have a gaming room with PS and PCs. There is also a hostel in the partner college which is pretty decent with good staff and food. Canteen I will say not the worst but still only a few items are good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: There's a projector in each class. Labs are big and Wi-Fi is available with high speed of 5G. One need to have own laptop. One should check food quality before staying in a hostel. There is a library, but it is only equipped with books related to Business.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel within the campus but they provide a hostel outside the campus. The students can also find accommodation on their own and the college will provide a bus service.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is good with good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The fashion department has its makeup room, a garment construction class, a photo studio for ramp walks and photoshoots, and a dying and printing class for workshops. The food served in hostels and canteen is worth the money paid. They provide good quality. The infrastructure of our college and hostels is up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are equipped with projectors. Our college is under CCTV surveillance. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel facilities are good. They provide meals 4 times a day. They also provide tiffin. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. We have a good canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc. We have a good canteen. The food served in the canteen is good. The hostel facilities are good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The hostel has a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect college for students who want to achieve goals. Excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Artemisia has very curious and learning environment. There are lots of classrooms labs. The rooms are fully equipped with all facilities like fast internet (all rooms have seperate Wi-Fi connections) cctv are placed, projectors are placed for easy learning.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best faculty.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs and good facilities. Our college is growing day by day so very soon it is capable of competing with the leading design colleges in India. When I used to live in hostel the food was okay, but hostel life was amazing. Hostels are located in areas from where everything is easily accessible.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful and healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has a unique infrastructure and the campus is equipped with constant high-speed internet and every classroom has AC and projector. The canteen is very hygienic. Hostels are available in the main city area and buses are provided and the quality of food is decent and they work on variety as well.

reviews.review_heading: Great education and environment.
reviews.review_text:
1. Very curious and learning environment. Labs and classrooms are equipped with all facilities like fast internet, cctv, projectors etc. 
2. Hostels provided to students are really good with all amenities like Wi-Fi, cctv surveillance,  4 time meals, housekeeping etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Artemisia College of Art and Design.
reviews.review_text: The library is a small room with cheap books. The water cooler doesn't work. There's nothing like sports. A gaming room is available for students, where they can play PC games and join tournaments. The food in the canteen is good, but you'll have to wait in line for 10 minutes just to get a cup of tea.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely good faculty members .
reviews.review_text: There is nothing you can complain about in the campus. For me it has been a homely feeling here. And ofcourse library, Wi-Fi, drafting studios, canteen, clay modelling studio are available. Hostels are available in the main city area and buses are provided. There are plenty of them. So you have choices.

The institute was established in 1935 in Milan as 'Istituto Artistico dell’Abbigliamento Marangoni’ and affiliated with Regent's University London, Istituto Marangoni, Mumbai offers courses in the fields of Fashion, Design, Fashion Busines, Fashion Communication & Image, Interior Design, Product Design, Luxury Brand Management and Visual Design. Students are also offered postgraduate, one year intensive, and short-term courses in multiple specialisations. paragraphs: Set up as a 'Istituto Artistico dell'Abbigliamento Marangoni', it was also affiliated to Regent's University London. Istituto Marangoni, Mumbai, is another private college that teaches fashion as well as design. With the collaboration of other institutions, the college has educated more than 45,000 luxury professionals, and among alumni are Domenico Dolce and Alessandro Sartori.It is still a world fashion, art and design institute. It hosts approximately 4,000 students annually from 107 countries at various campuses scattered throughout world capitals like Milan, Paris, London, Shanghai, Dubai, Shenzhen, Miami, and Mumbai. Follow the steps below to completeIstituto Marangoni, Mumbai admission process:
Application Process 2026

Students can apply online at the official website of Istituto Marangoni, Mumbai. The application has toeither be mailed or personally submitted to the concerned department of Istituto Marangoni, Mumbai. The online application fee must be paid. Students also need to submit documents and attach payment slip.
Selection Rounds 2026
Istituto Marangoni, Mumbai selects students based on merit secured in the qualifying exam (Class 12/ Graduation). The selection process is as below:
Merit List Release & Counselling 2026

After the course selection rounds are over, selected students must go through counselling for their respective courses.Istituto Marangoni, Mumbaithen publishes the merit list over multiple rounds mentioning the selected candidates. Those who find their names on the merit list must pay a specific amount to reserve a seat in the desired program in their name. Admission becomes final when the prescribed fee is paid and all the documentations are done.
lists: UG, Certificate course admissions are based on Class 12 scores.The selection process is strictly merit-based; focusing on candidates' academic performance and aptitude.
For PG programmes, entrance tests might be conducted along with the assessment of the portfolio and academic profile of the applicant.

faqs.question: Does Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya accept Class 12th marks?
What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?

college_info.intro:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers courses at the UG, PG, and Diploma levels. Wherein, courses such as BTech, BSc, and BDes are most popular among the candidates to pursue. The Institute offers BTech on the basis of Class 12 aggregate of 45% with valid scores of JEE Main. The total tuition fees of BTech at SVVV ranges from INR 3.1 Lakh to INR 5.4 Lakh.
Whereas, it offers BSc at a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 with qualification of institutional level examination. The Institute offers BSc at a total tuition fees ranging from INR 76.5 K to INR 2.2 Lakh. BDes on the other hand is offered on the basis of 45% to 50% Class 12 aggregate with JEE Main qualification. The tuition fees of BDes ranges around INR 2.2 Lakh to INR 2.5 Lakh. The duration of these courses vary from 3 years to 6 years. For more details around Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya has not yet released the placement stats. However, the University offers various placement opportunities along with assistance through training and collaborations. The University has various partnerships which further benefits in providing placements after the graduation of the students. While pursuing the course, students have the provision to seek industry exposure and take part in various events and activities conducted to provide industry knowledge and training programs.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who manage to secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 for the admission to UG level courses stand eligible for admission to Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya. Similarly, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT, ATMA and other equivalent exams to secure the final admission to the respective courses. Furthermore, candidates must meet the cutoff rank or score to be eligible through the accepted entrance exams. The final selection post entrance exams include counselling, and personal interviews. review_summary.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college with average facilities, but the wildlife is good, and there is a lake behind it.

content.Placements: Placements are average here, but if you're skill-wise good and maintain nice scores over the semesters, then there's a 20-30% chance you'll land a high placement. Top recruiting companies here in the B.Tech department include Impetus, Accenture, TCS, Yash Technologies, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The old/main buildings here are average and poorly maintained, but the newer buildings are really nice and look good. The campus is moderate in area; there is a basketball court, a lot of sports available, the canteen is nice, and there's a garden in front of the main block. The downside is that if you choose B. Tech, you'll be allotted the older blocks where they rarely clean, and some of the classrooms are disorganized and dirty, just like the kids there. A plus point is that a lot of dogs, cats, and birds roam around the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college has very good placement under DAVV.

content.Placements: The lowest package offered is 2 LPA and the highest is 8 LPA. Many students get internships. You cannot do anything before the 8th semester if you get a job, leave it just because of attendance. TCS also blacklists our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not working most of the time. They also use a new blocker, we cannot even utilize our time. The canteen is good, but there is no time for students to eat. Even if students are not good, they do make out in public, just fight and all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: According to this campus, it is worth taking admission in it.

content.Placements: As a final year student, our college is offering free placement training and helping us to build our career by providing us with internships and seminars. They offer so many internships of different types, it's up to you which one you want to join. They also offer internships in NGOs.
content.Infrastructure: Every department has its own building, which allows smooth functioning, and every department has its own service room for handling CCTVs and systems. There is a separate free library that consists of all the subjects and other general knowledge books, and so on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college. Overall rating of the college is good. .

content.Placements: The placement percentage varies by department. For core engineering branches like CSE, IT, and ECE, the placement rate is decent. Around 70%-80% of students get placed if they have good grades and skills. For non-core branches like civil or mechanical, the placements are comparatively lower.
content.Infrastructure: The SVVV campus is spacious and well-maintained. It has modern buildings and decent green space. The atmosphere is calm, and the campus is located near the heart of Indore city, so connectivity is good. Classrooms are mostly clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Smart classrooms are available in some departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured curriculum with scope for practical exposure.

content.Placements: Around 70-75 percent of students from our batch are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is approximately 10 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is around 4.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiters included companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Cognizant. A fair number of students (about 60 percent) got internships, mainly from startups and mid-size IT firms, with some landing opportunities through platforms like Internshala and LinkedIn. The most common roles offered are software developer, QA tester, business analyst, and support engineer.

admission_process.title: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Application Process 2025

The application mode is an online procedure. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website,https://admission.svvv.edu.in/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as CAT/MAT/XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/JEE Main, etc, for admission to the MBA, BTech among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theShri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya feeto confirm their seats at the university.

For UG courses candidates must pass Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG programmes. The institute offers more than 10 courses in various streams, such as Engineering, Design, Management, etc. The selection criteria for all courses are merit and entrance based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers more than 10 courses in various streams, such as Engineering, Design, Management, etc. Students can check the table below to know course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:Course NameCommon EligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects (40% for s in the case of SC /ST/OBC)JEE or any other entrance test + PIBDesClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects (40% for s in the case of SC /ST/OBC)JEE or any other entrance test + PIBSc (Hons)Class 12 in the Science stream with a 50% aggregateMP Pre Agriculture Test/Shri Vaishnav Entrance TestMBAGraduate with at least 50% aggregate (45% for the reserve category)CAT/MAT/XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ SVETPhDPG degree with a 55% aggregateNET/SET/GATE or any other equivalent NationalTest/SCETMTechBE/BTechGATE/SCET

faqs.question: How easy is it to survive at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya if you are from a different state or background?
faqs.answer: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya offers a safe and inclusive environment. It is comparatively easy to adjust with the environment, among the peers. There is no language barrier as such. Students get to experience diversity and inclusivity that the faculty and peers have to offer. Located in Madhya Pradesh, candidates coming from south might find it difficult to adjust, given the language difference and other lifestyle alterations.

faqs.question: Who are eligible for Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: Candidates who manage to secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 for the admission to UG level courses stand eligible for admission to Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya. Similarly, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT, ATMA and other equivalent exams to secure the final admission to the respective courses. Furthermore, candidates must meet the cutoff rank or score to be eligible through the accepted entrance exams. The final selection post entrance exams include counselling, and personal interviews. Candidates must qualify all the selection rounds to secure a seat at the University.

highlights.description: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #44 by the Outlook 2025 under the State Private University category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2025, Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya climbed 2 ranks to #44 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with average facilities, but the wildlife is good, and there is a lake behind it.
reviews.review_text: The old/main buildings here are average and poorly maintained, but the newer buildings are really nice and look good. The campus is moderate in area; there is a basketball court, a lot of sports available, the canteen is nice, and there's a garden in front of the main block. The downside is that if you choose B. Tech, you'll be allotted the older blocks where they rarely clean, and some of the classrooms are disorganized and dirty, just like the kids there. A plus point is that a lot of dogs, ca...

reviews.review_heading: My college has very good placement under DAVV.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working most of the time. They also use a new blocker, we cannot even utilize our time. The canteen is good, but there is no time for students to eat. Even if students are not good, they do make out in public, just fight and all.

reviews.review_heading: According to this campus, it is worth taking admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Every department has its own building, which allows smooth functioning, and every department has its own service room for handling CCTVs and systems. There is a separate free library that consists of all the subjects and other general knowledge books, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Overall rating of the college is good. .
reviews.review_text: The SVVV campus is spacious and well-maintained. It has modern buildings and decent green space. The atmosphere is calm, and the campus is located near the heart of Indore city, so connectivity is good. Classrooms are mostly clean and equipped with projectors and whiteboards. Smart classrooms are available in some departments.

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured curriculum with scope for practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is decent. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors. The department has good Wi-Fi connectivity and well-maintained computer labs. Library is stocked with relevant academic resources and is a quiet place for self-study. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are manageable, and the mess food is decent, though repetitive. The hostel has medical facilities and basic sports equipment, but more recreational areas could be added. Overall, the infrastructure mee...

reviews.review_heading: My college life at SVVV, Indore.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the infrastructure 4 out of 5. Classrooms were well-equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs had the essential systems and software needed for practical work. Library was spacious and quiet. It had a good collection of books. Campus also had basic medical facilities. Sports grounds and game facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Students can come here to study and enjoy their college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course and hostels is very nice. Even the infrastructure of the college is very nice. Hostels have facilities like Wi-Fi and water coolers. Even the college has an Apple lab. The college provides a personal Wi-Fi server for each student.

reviews.review_heading: I am 100% satisfied with the good quality education provided by it.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very nice. Hostels are very reliable for students with good Wi-Fi facilities. It also provides a canteen and mess for daily breakfast in month and dinner. The college infrastructure is based on modern architecture and is very attractive.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty. It is good in studies. The canteen food is not hygienic enough.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good for courses. Wi-Fi is good, and labs are very good. Departments are also very good. The quality of the hostel is good like food and tables. AC is good. The canteen is not hygienic so much. Sports and games are played in college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good with this fee and all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and the new building is very good. After the paint and a little change, it looks too good. The canteen is very hygienic. The library is too big with the best facilities. Classrooms are also good. The cleanliness is also maintained.

reviews.review_heading: An absolute complete college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained with a modern campus which is essential for a smooth academic journey. The buildings are spacious. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. It enhances the learning experience. Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus ensures that students can study and collaborate online. The labs are also well-equipped, especially in our department with high-speed internet, updated systems (both Windows and Mac OS), and dedicated staff. The college...

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements and course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available all around the campus and is free to use. Labs and classrooms are nice, well neat and clean library as well.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and educational environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is too fast and all the other are very clean and managed. There are 2 libraries in my college. The food quality offered in the hostel and mess is 4 out of 5, and the medical facility is also 4 out of 5. For sports and games, colleges also provide extra services.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are very spacious and ventilated classrooms in which 60 students can be fit in very easily. The labs are very clean. They are filled with good quality computers and desktops. The canteen is really good and I think the kachori is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have a big campus and good infrastructure. The food served served in the mess and canteen is good. They organise sports events.

college_info.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, SVVV offers scholarship to physically challeneged students. Ten Scholarships equivalent to 50% of Annual Tuition Fee or INR 50,000 only, whichever is less, will be awarded to the students who have more than 40% physical disability (certified by competent medical authority of the state government). The Scholarship will be awarded to only those students who are selected on merit. The Scholarship will stop if a student gets ATKT at any stage of the programme. A student will not be eligible to avail more than one Scholarship of the university at any given time.

Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech specilisation in Aerospace Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automotive Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Robotics Engineering, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Automotive Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

review_summary.college_name: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(Dec 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Around 5-6 students enrolled in the year I took admission. Next year, there were 11-12 students who took admission. There are no placement opportunities or internships provided by our college, which is a huge satisfaction, given that we pay so many fees. There are no recruiting companies that come for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournaments and club activities that keep happening from time to time. The infrastructure and teaching quality are too good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: We are still in our first year and are the followers of the pilot batch. We have heard companies such as AB and GE have come to place, and a few other industries located in Peenya, with packages of 2.5 to 5 LPA. ABB and GE are a few companies that have selected our seniors. We are still in our first year, so we have just heard it from our seniors. A few companies are giving a stipend of 8000.
content.Infrastructure: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average hovered around 6 LPA. Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank are among the recruiters. Finance and consulting firms offered internships. There are fewer tier-1 roles, according to some students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automotive Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.

content.Placements: Approximately 70-75% of the students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 12 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Ashok Leyland, Bosch, Mahindra, and Tata Motors were among the top recruiters. Auto factories and R&D companies offered internships, but the core job roles were more restricted than those of IT-based profiles.
content.Infrastructure: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computational Social Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: A lot of roles are offered in very high-verified job sites, like the companies TCS, Infosys, IBM, Amazon, and also Google, with an average salary package depending on the department, but in a range of 4-7 LPA, with the highest domestic package reaching up to 52 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

admission_overview.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are open. Ramaiah University offers UG & PG courses in the stream of Science, Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Humanities, etc. For the majority of courses, students are required to appear for RUAS AT, which is the MS Ramaiah entrance exam. The university in addition to conducting its own entrance test, accepts state-level entrance exams such as PGCET, KCET, COMEDK, etc as well. For admission to BVoc course, MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences offers merit-based admission. Seats at the university are offered through a common counselling process to all the UG & PG courses. More details around Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences course admissions are elaborated below.

Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the programme. admission_process.title: MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MSRUAS admission processconsists of multiple steps. It includes applying online to RUASAT for entrance-based admission or registering for direct admission. More details aroundM.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission processare as follows:
Application Process

MSRUAS application process is conducted in online mode. Candidates can apply on the official website for their desired programme. An application fee of INR 2000 needs to be paid through online gateway.
Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on entrance exams for all of the courses except for the BVoc programme. The university conducts RUAS-AT for admission to the remaining programmes. Alternatively, valid scores of other national-level exams including CUET/ NEET/ JEE or state-level exams - KCET/ COMEDK are also accepted,
Counselling Process & Document Verification

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates are offered seats through common counselling process. Candidates who get selected must download and fill an admission form on the university's official website. After filling the form, candidates need to pay a tuition fee and submit documents at the university for the verification.

MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fee structuremay include components such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, etc. Some elements are to be paid only once, while the remaining are charged yearly or semesterly. The fee range includes multiple specialisations. The seat intake may change every academic year. Students can check the table below to know about the intake andMS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences feesfor some of the popular courses:
Note: This data is from official sources and can change.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a two-year MBA course at Ramaiah University is INR 8 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at MSRUAS?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences (MSRUAS) is 240. The programme is offered in 9 specializations and has a duration of 2 years. Candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% marks and must appear and qualify the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET) for admission. The university also considers scores of other national-level entrance exams for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at MS Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to MBA course, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. MS Ramaiah accepts a valid score of PGCET exam, which is a state-level entrance exam, conducted by KEA. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to PG courses.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations does MS Ramaiah University offer?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University offers admission to MBA through the Department of Management Studies. This course is offered across nine specialisations. These are Marketing Management, Human Resource Management, Operations Management, Financial Management, Small Business and Entrepreneurship, Banking and Financial Services, etc.

faqs.question: What is fee structure of BTech at M.S. Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a four-year BTech course at Ramaiah University ranges from INR 7.2 Lacs - INR 21 lakh. The fee is calculated based on first-year fee. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same. Apart from this, there are several other components that need to be paid during the submission of fee along with the tuition fee.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat in BTech course at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech or BTech (Lateral Entry) course at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step is to either qualify for the university's in-house entrance exam RUASAT or state-level entrance exams such as KCET/ COMED K with a valid score. The selected candidates are given seats based in the respective counselling session.

faqs.question: Who are eligible for BTech at Ramaiah University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to BTech at Ramaiah University, students need to fulfil minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass Class 12 with 45% with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory courses along with Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biology, Electronics or Computer science. Students who belong to reserved category are required to get 40% aggregate in the same. The eligibility criteria for BTech (Lateral Entry) is also the same.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, for admission to BTech and BTech (Lateral Entry) courses, MS Ramaiah conducts in-house entrance exams, i.e., RUASAT. This exam is particularly conducted for admission of students to its UG courses. Students can get admisison to BTech after qualifying for this exam. Those who are willing to get admission through this exam, need to apply for this exam on the official website of MSURAS by paying an application amount of INR 1,250.

faqs.question: Does MSRUAS accept KCET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, KCET exam is accepted by MSRUAS for admission to BTech programme. Along with that, candidates can also secure admission based on a valid JEE Main exam. Candidates applying for admission within a valid KCET rank of 5,000 are offered a scholarship of INR 30,000.

faqs.question: What is the Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025?
faqs.answer: The Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences COMEDK Cutoff 2025 was released for all categories and rounds. The COMEDK Cutoff 2025 ranged from39103to109381as per the last round closing ranks for the General AI category. The COMEDK cutoff is applicable for admissions to various BTech specialisation atM.S Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Ramaiah University Bangalore without CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, students seeking MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences admission can apply for their preferred courses without the need for appearing for the NTA CUET exam. Students can apply on the basis of the RUASAT test conducted by the university itself for the majority of courses. Further, the university also accepts scoring from other entrance tests such as COMEDK UGET, Uni-GAUGE, KCET, Karnataka PGCET, GATE, among others.

faqs.question: Does MS Ramaiah have entrance exam for admissions?
faqs.answer: MS Ramaiah University (MSRUAS) admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates who want to apply for the UG/ PG courses are required to appear for RUASAT. Moreover, the candidates who want a Ph.D. course admissions must appear for RUASAT followed by a presentation round. Moreover, courses like B.Tech, BDS and MS accept national-level entrance scores like JEE, KCET COMEDK, and NEET respectively.
