nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences climbed 12 ranks to #56 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences fell 6 ranks to #22 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Mediocre because of no placements or internship opportunities, yet the infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: There's everything, the classrooms are very spacious, and there are smart boards, there's Wi-Fi, labs, and a library as well, which has plenty of books required for all the departments. The hostels are very clean and tidy. The food is very yummy and also hygienic. You can get all sorts of food, ranging from South Indian to North Indian and even snacks. There's a medical college and a hospital right next to our building, so medical help is always readily available. There are also sports tournamen...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College food and mess are always pathetic. As per my friends who are staying in the hostel, they have reviewed it as good food in the hostel. However, the college canteen pricing was cheap, but the food quality was not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: MBA course information and admission process at Ramaiah University of Applied Science.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers robust Wi-Fi, computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is respectable. There are some, but not many, sports and cultural facilities. Emergency medical care is subpar and could be better.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: M.Tech and B.Tech Automotive Engineering Course Admission.
reviews.review_text: Practical learning is supported by well-equipped labs, CAD/CAM facilities, and automotive workshops. Classrooms are large, and Wi-Fi is dependable. The mess food is mediocre, but the hostel is decent. There are some sports facilities, but not many. Although it could be more timely, medical care is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied within a year with great facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The food and infrastructure are top-notch, except for the Wi-Fi issues. I am not using any hostel right now, but based on what I heard, this is the thing they face; they have a proper curfew and good food, which properly provides the needed nutrients.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was well-equipped with all major facilities such as Wi-Fi, showers, etc. Shared rooms were available (2 in 1 room). Each room had a chair and study table for each student, along with separate cupboards. The fees were  Rs.45,000 per year, and the mess fees were around Rs.4,000 a month. The food quality was a total disaster. My advice would be to take a flat outside the campus and have good food. University hostel facilities in both the Peenya campus and the Gangotri campus had good roo...

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels provided single and shared rooms, with prices ranging from Rs.35,000 to Rs.60,000 per room, including electricity charges. Food was not included.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were good as my friend resides in the hostel. I used to go to his room in my free time. Room was shared as 2 students were residing in a room. There were separate things for both students in a room like a wardrobe, bed, table, and 2 chairs. College had PG named 555-PG. Mess fee was Rs 4,000 for every month which included breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: It's good as it has a hostel inside the college with all live home facilities where it's been provided with a gym, yoga, sports room, club room, and party room. Each room is provided with a self-system for the students living for their usage, food is good and they provide to your room 3 times a day. This course is meant for me to join the top companies in which the Ramaiah has been liked with that companies and they are giving very good facilities to the students. My dream is to become a very go...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Faculty of Engineering and Technology, M.S. Ramaiah University of Applied SciencesReviewed on 13 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has an environment to find minded people and grow with part of difficulties and blockades.
reviews.review_text: We have special rooms for boys and girls known as a sac with an in-built gym and other board games as well. There is a ground for football, cricket, and indoor courts as well. The hostel is average with okay food. It has a 3-star hostel. Timings are preferred for students.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements yet by the college, but it's a great experience to learn the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with classrooms, places to eat, and good sanitation practices. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms have interactive boards to help us with our academics and course understanding. There is a huge park, wide corridors, a huge food street, and good parking facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by M S Ramaiah Medical CollegeReviewed on 24 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Future leaders from MS Ramaiah Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is present within the MS Ramaiah Medical Hospital. There are 1300+ special beds available for explaining practical cases to students. The campus area is expansive and broad, and it is quite peaceful, amazing, and relaxing.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of Ramaih College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the main highlight of the college. The campus is vast comprising 13 different faculty members like engineering, medical, dental, etc. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, labs are equipped with all the necessary instruments and chemicals. Classes are high-teach comprising smartboard speakers, and comfortable seats for individual students. The library is on the third floor where all the required books are available we can get them for 3 or 15 days. The hostel i...

reviews.review_heading: A college that everyone should check out. It has a really good faculty and a big, beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities wise, it is really great. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and each table has separate charging ports for laptops or mobile phones. There are projectors, speakers, and more. The campus has a vast library, places to relax, an indoor sports complex, and other amenities. The quality of the hostel is good, and more hostels are being built. The food is also good and of high quality.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good overall.
reviews.review_text: We have one lab but 2-3 batches have lab classes at the same time. We have to find some other classrooms which are empty for the lab. The hostel is too bad. The food is not bad and many get food poisoning. Water is also not good and it is not purified. The bathing water is in yellow or brown colors a few times.

paragraphs: Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences provides two types of scholarships. Students can choose to apply for an Admission Test Scholarship or a Merit Scholarship. It is to note that Merit Scholarship can either be a Scholarship of Excellence or a Scholarship of Distinction. Besides, students can avail loans, government and non-government scholarships.  In an academic year, Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences students are eligible for only one Admission Test or Merit Scholarship.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Alagappa University ranks #76 under the category 'Overall'.

Alagappa University admissions 2025 are open. A few more updates are as forllows:

table.details: - 17th by NIRF under the State Public University - 47th by NIRF under the University category - 59th by the QS Ranking under the Asian University Rankings - Southern Asia category

college_info.intro:
Alagappa University offers MBA and BSc as flagship courses. MBA is offered in specialisations such as Marketing, Finance, Production & Operations, Human Resources, Systems, Insurance, and Entrepreneurship. There is a reading room, library, modern classrooms, and other facilities available for students. Alagappa University faculty comprises of various individuals from several fields including Commerce, Agriculture, and Psychology. MBA students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant,TCS, Axis Bank.
Alagappa University - Karaikudi is ranked at 56 in NIRF 2023 under the Overall category, 30th in NIRF 2023 under the University (Overall) category, and 51st by QS World University Rankings 2023 under the Southern Asia category. Check below some of the courses offered by Alagappa University and their respective eligibility and Alagappa University fee structure:
For more information about Alagappa University check out the below video:

Besides the central library, there was a departmental library. At the hotel, the mess food was tolerable. The university hospital was good and close by. There was an ambulance that would come and pick you up if you got sick.

admission_overview.college_name: Alagappa University Course Admissions 2025: Last Dates, Application, Eligibility, Selection Process

paragraphs: AU admisson is both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts an entrance exam for certain courses. AU offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD-level programmes in the fields of Arts, Science, Education, etc. Additionally, AU has a dedicated training and placement cell and an online portal that acts as a bridge between students and recruiters.

The university also offers courses in distance and online modes. Some online programmes such as MBA, MA, MCom, BBA, BA, and BCom are available. In distance mode, various UG, PG, Diploma, Diploma, and Certificate courses are offered. Minimum eligibility should be fulfilled in order to gain admission to distance and online courses.

The university has courses available at UG, PG and PhD levels. Candidates must ensure they are eligible for the pereferred course before applying for the same. A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is necessary for PG programmes. Below are popularAlagappa University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Check out otherAlagappa University Courses
Algappa University fee includes different components, such as course fee, university share, learning centre share etc.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. The table below provides the seat intake for various courses offered at Algappa University:
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

The university offers multiple courses in different modes, such as full-time, distance, and online programmes. The application and admission criteria differ from course to course as per the mode of the course. In case of any queries regarding the admission process, reach out to the admission office.
1 - Alagappa University Application Process

To apply for Alagappa University admission, candidates need to visit the official website and fill an online application form along with paying the application fee. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 600 for entrance courses and INR 400 for non-entrance programmes,
2 - Selection

The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to courses such as MBA, MCA, B.Ed, MSc. For merit-based course admissions, applicants' marks in the last qualifying examination are taken into consideration. For courses like MBA, selected students need to appear for group discussions and personal interview rounds.
3 - Result Declaration

Alagappa University announces the results to declare the names of selected students for admission. Candidates appearing for the university entrance test will be able to check their results on the website, however, they will be selected based on scores in the exam.
4 - Seat Allocation & Admission Fee Payment
After the result declaration, seats are allotted to the eligible students based on merit or entrance exam scores. During seat allotment, reservation policy also plays a crucial role.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure at Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must first apply for their preferred course on the official website of the university. Alagappa university admission is both entrance and merit-based, depending upon the nature of the programme. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to B.Ed, MBA, MCA and MSc. faqs.question: What is the minimum marks for Alagappa University exam?
faqs.answer: The passing minimum marks in Alagappa University exam is 40% out of 25/15 marks in theory papers. A minimum of 40% out of 40/10* marks is required in practical exams.The passing minimum for university exams shall be 40% out of 75/ 60*marks for Theory papers and 40% out of 60/40* marks) for Practical papers.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSc at Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Applicant must have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam from a recognised board. For BSc in Physical Education admission, the applicant shall have passed the exam with40% (35% for reserved category) aggregatewith proficiency in sports. The upper age limit for admission to BSc (Catering Science and Hotel Management) is 21 years. Students must check eligibility conditions carefully before admission form filling. The relevant documents also have to submit at the time of admission.

placement_data.title: Alagappa University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2024 placement statistics yet.The median package offered to UG (3-year) students was INR 1.27 LPA . For PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 2.40 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA , respectively during the Alagappa University placements 2023..

tables.context: What is the highest package offered during Alagapp
Is there placement in Alagappa University?

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Alagappa University placements?
faqs.answer: The Alagappa University highest package has not been disclosed officially. However, the University has released the median package in the NIRF report 2024. As per the report, the highest median package offered during 2023 placements was INR 3.50 LPA and was made to PG (3-year) students. Check the table below to know the salary details for the past three years of Alagappa University placements: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) UG (3-year) INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.44 LPA INR 1.27 LPA PG (2-year) INR 1.80 LPA INR 2.46 LPA INR 2.40 LPA PG (3-year) N/A INR 2.70 LPA INR 3.50 LPA NOTE: The 2021 salary details for PG (3-year) courses are unavailable and, hence not showcased in the above table.

faqs.question: Is there placement in Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has a placement cell. During 2023 placements, 61 UG and 317 PG students were placed. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 1.27 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA, respectively. For PG (3-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 3.50 LPA. The important details related to Alagappa University placements 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (UG-3 year) 216 Students placed (UG-3 year) 61 Median package (UG-3 year) INR 1.27 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 1,226 Students placed (PG-2 year) 295 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 2.40 LPA Total students (PG-3 year) 63 Students placed (PG-3 year) 22 Median package (PG-3 year) INR 3.50 LPA NOTE: The above details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are placements for MBA at Alagappa University?
faqs.answer: Alagappa University has not released a concise placements report for MBA course. However, the university NIRF report 2024 is out. As per this report, out of 1,226 PG (two-year) candidates, 295 were placed. Moreover, the median package offered to the Alagappa University PG (two-year) candidates stood at INR 2.4 LPA in 2023.

faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing a BCom degree course?
faqs.answer: BCom course is the gateway to job opportunities in several fields such as Accounting, Finance, Economics, Taxation, Insurance, etc. One can become an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. after graduating with a BCom degree. This degree is also beneficial to those students who want to run their own businesses. Because of the variety of work prospects it gives, BCom is one of the most popular undergraduate educational programmes. Commerce is the nation's most important industry, and it has a huge impact on the economy. The expanding economy has resulted in a variety of job opportunities in the business sector. As a result, a Bachelor of Commerce degree can lead to a lucrative career.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Alagappa University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #73 rank in the Overall category, #44 under University, and #14 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Alagappa University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 11th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
4th Best Among QS World University Rankings Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Alagappa University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Alagappa University's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #73 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #44 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'State Public University' category have displayed an increasing trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Alagappa University climbed 3 ranks to #14 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
Alagappa University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Alagappa University fell 84 ranks to #369 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Alagappa University fell 26 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Alagappa University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Alagappa University has 15 hostels with 427 rooms for men and women research scholars and graduate students of the University. Separate hostel for the overseas students. The hostel rooms are well furnished and well ventilated. There is provision to accommodate around 1,200 students. The hostels have separate hygienic mess halls, reading rooms supplemented with leading English and Tamil dailies, magazines and Employment News.

library.description: The Central Library of Alagappa University includes one lakh volumes of printed books, subscriptions to 149 printed periodicals, 492 items of non-book materials, and 1446 volumes of theses in print form. Access to 6242+ numbers of Online journals and 1,31,000+ numbers of e-theses are also available. The Library has all the amenities of a University Library – an inviting exterior, spacious Reading Halls, three-tier Stack Rooms, lucrative Conference Hall, elegant Discussion Room; Rooms for the Librarian, Library staff and different sections of the Library. Besides the Central Library, there are four aculty Libraries and Department Libraries to cater to the needs of the users in the respective locations. The Central Library is kept open on all the days of the year, except on Public Holidays (approximately 340 days in a year). The working hours are, on weekdays from 8-00A.M to 8.00 P.M., and during weekends from 10-00 A.M. to 5-00 P.M.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Throwball Court, Volleyball Court, Tennikoit Court, Kho-Kho Court, Kabaddi Court, Three Handball Field, Four Hockey Field, Athletics Track

reviews.review_heading: Recommended for students who are able to pay moderate fee.
reviews.review_text: This is one of the top universities in Karaikudi which has highlighted features and performances that are quickly noticeable from their college website. Hostellers are levied with reasonable charges for accommodation as well as food expenses. Tuition fees vary from one person to another based on their previous records and their history.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.A. in History course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and equipment in our office were beautiful. There was always Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms were well-maintained. Besides the central library, there was a departmental library. At the hotel, the mess food was tolerable. The university hospital was good and close by. There was an ambulance that would come and pick you up if you got sick.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for M.A. in economics course.
reviews.review_text: Our college offered 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. Labs were fully functional with all equipment. Our college had a central library on the 4th floor with more than 2,000 books. Hostel food had good value for money. The restaurant was open until midnight. Medical facilities were available 24X7, including an ambulance service. Our college had great sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best university for MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was solid. The wireless network was impressive. Nevertheless, Wi-Fi was accessible only for laptops. University bans the use of mobile phones for Wi-Fi. The infrastructure was solid. Additionally, the laboratories were available during extended hours for interested students. Classrooms and libraries were beneficial. The hostel accommodations were fairly simple, lacking in any luxuries.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best College for an MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management course.
reviews.review_text: The college building has 8 floors, and it is the tallest building in Tamil Nadu. The college has a Wi-Fi facility in the computer lab, and the classrooms have blackboards with display devices. A library of non-new books. The college offers separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Nachiappa Swamigal Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good for the fee charged, but placements are poor. The faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but the hostel is average. It's a small college, and the fee structure is affordable. We are more likely to join the college. It's totally disappointing. So I suggest students do not expect the college and college life. Students can go to the college directly, visit classrooms, and decide to join the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chennais Amirta International Institute of Hotel ManagementReviewed on 2 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities, and the infrastructure is good. They teach every single thing very well. Honestly, I don't know much about the hostel because I travel from home, but my friends who stay in the hostel say it has good quality. They get food three times a day, and sports and games are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by Thiagarajar School of ManagementReviewed on 26 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities available in the hostel were good, and the food served in the mess had good taste. Sports and games were also available. There was good infrastructure and a big ground. In our college, the hostel was very close to the college. Wi-Fi is there in every class. Our campus provides facilities like computer labs, Dell systems, iOS lab, library, canteen, playground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This is the greatest college overall.
reviews.review_text: The best materials were used for the classrooms, restrooms, library, canteen, hostel, and other facilities at this college, which had excellent infrastructure. Every facility was open. In addition to having clean food, the canteen has nice facilities. However, during the yearlong vacation, athletic events were only planned once a year.

reviews.review_heading: If you only want to study it's heaven.
reviews.review_text: The department of facilities was good because most of the necessary facilities were provided like water filters, air-conditioners, fans, Wi-Fi, etc. Hostel facilities were also same like AC, water, Wi-Fi, etc. Food quality was also good and hygiene was maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Caussanel College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and NEET halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor's visit with medicines. The mess has 100 fans. Sports are taught without any extra fees, and we study in the same college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best university for M.Sc. in chemistry course.
reviews.review_text: The apparatus is sufficient. Although several research laboratories require repair. The classrooms are in good shape, and the seats are well-furnished. While Wi-Fi is offered in hotels, it is not available in classrooms. The library is open from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM and from 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM, and it offers nearly all of the literature that students require. As a daily professor, I am unable to comment on hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.Sc. in Chemistry (Nanoscience & Technology) course.
reviews.review_text: Compared to other universities, the rooms were not that big. If you are planning to attend the university purely for infrastructure reasons, then this is not the right university. The law university is great, recently built, and has excellent central air conditioning. The campus is being renovated, it may take more than 2–3 years, but the courses are fully air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Overall all best college for MBA in logistics supply management course.
reviews.review_text: Our learning centers at this university are classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi. There are books in the library, and it produces the most wonderful atmosphere. I was provided food and milk every day, and my motel was open at night. Student clinics are available. Sports offered the best facilities on campus and are held every day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Syed Ammal College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 5 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Amazing to take part in this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. Hostel has the rooms with attached bathrooms and also common bathrooms. Every night our hostel has a doctor's meeting with a medicine. Mess is available with 100 fans. Sports are studied without fees and study in same college.

review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, drafting tables, store room for the model, laser cutting machine, carpenter lab, library, cement workshop, textile labs, As sharda has its hospital great medical facilities good and hygiene food, quite colorful hostel infrastructure, temple, laundry building, 24*7 cafe.

reviews_list.review_title: The placements is poor and faculty are partial, and that's all I can say, else everything is good.

faqs.answer: Master of Design (M.Des) is a two-year postgraduate degree programme in Design. Masters in Design is usually undertaken by those with a strong interest in the arts and who aspire to become the best in the design field. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue MDes course from Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning:A Master of Design degree is the gateway to specialisation and research as it is an advanced degree to conquer the Fashion and Design Industry in different disciplines such as Craft, Textiles, Special Needs, Publications, Media, Lifestyle Products, Graphics, and User Experience Design.The scope of a Master of Design degree is huge as it opens opportunities in various streams such as Industrial Engineering and Design, Product Research Analyst, Communication Design, Product Design, and Engineering, Visual Design, Animation, and Automotive Designing.Every day, the world of design evolves, and as a result, the demand for motivated and creative designers grows. During this degree, students will have the opportunity to work on assignments that will provide them with hands-on experience working in design studios.
faqs.question: Q: What are the benefits of pursuing M.Des from Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning?

Candidates can look at the exact fee bifuraction of BDes tuition fee at SAP by visiting the official website.

admission_process.title: Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning Admission 2025

paragraphs: Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BArch, BDes, MDes, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted toSAP Sharda University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers seven courses in the Architecture & Planning, Arts and Design streams. The application process at Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theSharda School of Design, Architecture and Planningcourse admission2025.

The mode of study for Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read on to know more about theSharda School of Design, Architecture and Planningcourse admission2025.
Particulars
SSDAP Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

SSDAP courses' admissions are based on merit/ entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forSharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning courses:
JEE Main, NATA, CUET

Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning admission admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam for BArch courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the SSDAP:
STEP 1: Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at SSDAP are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of JEE Main, NATA for BArch courses, and merit-based for BDes, BVA and MDes courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Des at SAP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: Hey buddy,You can take admission in SAP Sharda University by appearing in SUAT examination conducted by the University.But you should have Mathematics as a compulsory subject in your 12th.Also you must have 50% marks in your 12th.There is one more eligibility criteria of this university for it's B.Tech and B.Des programme that you should have physics and a subject in your 12th but it depends on the programme you are pursuing.Hope this will help.

faqs.question: Is direct admission available for BDesign course at Sharda School of Design?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available forBDesign courseat Sharda University. The students who want admission must appear for SUAT exam. After clearing the exam, they need to clear the interview round for final admission at Sharda School of Design. The admission for BDesign course are currently open at Sharda School of Design. Students must make their application before due date.

faqs.question: What is the admission fee for BDes admissions at SAP?
faqs.answer: BDes admission fee at SAP is currently unknown. Generally, BDes admission fee includes the first instalment of tuition fee which is INR 2.7 Lacs for each BDes course offered by SAP and the application charges which are INR 1,500 and INR 1,000 for boys and girls respectively. Candidates are advised to visit the official website of SAP to confirm the admission fees for BDes course

faqs.question: Can I get admission to SAP Sharda University for B.Des with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Hey buddy,Ofcourse yes, You can take admission in SAP Sharda University with 60 % marks but this is not only the eligibility criteria for admission.You should have Physics and Mathematics in your 12th and you have to appear in SUAT or NATA Examination. After clearing the exam you will have an interview and then you will be admitted to the program.Best wishes from my side buddy. :)

faqs.question: How to get admission at SAP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: You have various ways to get admitted in SAP Sharda University.  It depends on the programme you are interested in.For programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, Journalism and Mass Communication and Hons courses. You have to appear in SUAT (Sharda University Admission Test).If you are a JEE aspirant then you can take admission on the basis of your JEE scores.And if you are interested in Architecture and Planning programme then you will have to appear in NATA or JEE.Hope this will be helpful.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning?
faqs.answer: Sharda School of Design, Architecture and Planning admissions are currently open. The college offers courses, such as BArch, BDes, MDes, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted to SAP Sharda University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers seven courses in the Architecture & Planning, Arts and Design streams.

faqs.question: Does SAP Sharda University accept SUAT score?
faqs.answer: No, To take admission in Architecture and Planning Course in Sharda University you have to appear in NATA or JEE. And you will have to score good in the exam after that you will have a interview and you can get admission in the prestigious college.?SUAT is applicable on different courses like B.Tech, BCA, MCA, BBA, B.Com, MBA, Journalism and Mass Communication and all the disciplines of BA (Hons) and B.Sc (Hons).Be a hardworking guy buddy you will definitely crack it.Hope this will be helpful.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by SAP Sharda University for admission?
faqs.answer: Hey buddy,There are various entrance exam scores which are accepted by the SAP University, it depends on the programme you are opting.Scorecards that are valid are JEE, SUAT, NATA (for Architecture and Planning)etc..

placement_data.title: SAP Sharda University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SAP Sharda University placement cell unction as a bridge between the University’s Schools , Industries and Students. The Placement activities are for the students and by the students. The Sharda School of Design Architecture and Planning is yet to release its placement details for the batch 2025. However, the NIRF Report for 2025 is out. As per the report a total of 530, UG 4-year students were placed. Further, for UG 5-year and PG 2-year, the number of students placed in the 2024 placement season was 419 and 515 . The median package recorded for UG 4-year and UG 5-year stood at INR 4.60 LPA and INR 5.75 LPA , respectively. The median package offered to PG 2-year students during SAP Sharda University placements 2024 was INR 4.60 LPA.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Des at SAP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: If you are diving into design it should be your own interest. Just explore your mind and ask it, that which kind of design you like to do. In SAP Sharda University there are many Design programme available. Like Product Design, Fashion Design, Painting, Interior design, communication Design etc. You can pursue any design programme as of your interest. If you talk about the placements and future scope, then in interior design and product design the placements are pretty attractive. But still I would suggest you should pursue your interest.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee structure for the SAP BDes?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee structure at SAP for BDes courses follows a per annum model. The BDes course a SAP is a 4 year course with 8 semesters where, each year is comprised of 2 semesters. Candidates can look at the exact fee bifuraction of BDes tuition fee at SAP by visiting the official website.

facilities: Scanned Class 10, Class 12 and graduation mark sheet

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere and life .
reviews.review_text:
Facility and infrastructure available for course department like labs, classroom, library and wi-fi all facilities are very well maintained and well constructed interior department is also good and provided many facilities 
the hostel for both boys and girls are very well.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provide by the college are good enough, but the faculty's approach to the students is very pathetic. I am not a hosteller, so I didn't know the facilities provided by them. Medical and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, highly recommended facilities and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, drafting tables, store room for the model, laser cutting machine, carpenter lab, library, cement workshop, textile labs, As sharda has its hospital great medical facilities good and hygiene food, quite colorful hostel infrastructure, temple, laundry building,  24*7 cafe.

reviews.review_heading: The placements is poor and faculty are partial, and that's all I can say, else everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Everything in the college is good. All the classrooms are clean. There are no medical facilities. We only have to manage that even though when we go through with PMS we have to run for asking about the pads. They never provide us with anything. I am not a hosteler, but still, I have seen hostel rooms, they are very short and clumsy. The hostel food is like a poison for hostelers because of the quality which is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: A college with decent placement and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has the largest campus in Greater Noida. The architecture of the building is amazing. There is a very warm and friendly crowd of people. The university is perfect for everyone. One will be amazed by visiting the university. The campus has many restaurants and food speciality corners for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very Satisfied with the faculty, college and the university.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that are available to us are full campus Wi-Fi, we can go to any corners and still have internet. The classrooms could be a little better as the room is old and furniture is also old but all of them are functional. They also provide computer lab for the students who don't have a laptop. Library is good. The quality of hostel is not pretty good, I am a day scholar but I have heard from hostellers that the food provided in the mess is not up to the mark, and they even end up with fo...

data.description: Yes, the college provides loan facility as well. Sharda School of Design has partnered with several banks to provide this facility. These banks are as ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, IDFC First Bank, Yes Bank, Bank of Baroda, IDBI Bank and many more. This makes it easier for students who cannot pay the fees in lump-sum. Since this facility allows them to make payment in instalments.

faqs.answer: A:    At UID Delhi-NCR, the tuition fees for a four-year BDes (Hons) course is INR 24 Lacs. Whereas, the tuition fee for BDes (GDP) course is INR 40 Lacs.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at UID Delhi-NCR?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the BDes course at Unitedworld Institute of Design, GD Goenka University is INR 11 Lacs - INR 17 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as transportation charges, admission fee, and various other charges.
faqs.question: What is the total fee of BDes at Unitedworld Institute of Design, GD Goenka University?

The mode of Unitedworld Institute of Design, GD Goenka University course admission is online.
faqs.question: Can I be admitted to the Unitedworld Institute of Design without UID DAT?

faqs.answer: A:    No, it's not difficult to get admission at Unitedworld Institute of Design. Admission to Unitedworld Institute of Design is based on an entrance exam. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. (Hons.) in Animation and Digital Media - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not that good. They were giving unpaid internships to the past student. But now I guess it will improve as GD Goenka has tied up with UID.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a mac lab in our college. The block is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available with good speed. The classroom is spacious with a projector and speakers. The block has an auditorium also. Facilities are cool and the rules are strict in GD Goenka like fines.
review_content.Faculty: Semester exams are a little difficult as we have mostly practicals. Sometimes the external is not good so they ask a lot of questions. But facilities try their best to give good marks to students, and they're supportive. We have a mid-term examination also for practice. Faculty members are very supportive and helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. (Hons.) in Visual Communication - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest.

review_content.Placements: Placements in GD Goenka are fine, you can get good placements if you're pursuing design and for all the other course placements too. The CRC helps a lot so you can be guaranteed with a fine placement. One can expect good companies to come for placements they also facilitate students in their off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest, the campus be it the main campus or the hostel campus area are well built and taken care of. The lawns and fields are well maintained. The hostel is the best part of the campus and how the rooms are made for both boys and girls, well-equipped with all the modern facilities such as Wi-Fi and power backup 24*7.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Fashion Design and Styling - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and management of this college.

content.Placements: UID gives decent placements and internship opportunities to its students. Approximately 30–35% of the students get placements at our college in the design course. The average package offered at the college for our course was between 4 - 9 LPA. The top recruiters at the college were various fashion and design companies.
content.Infrastructure: UID has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students. All kinds of modern facilities were available for the students interactive learning. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities were given to the students. Mess and canteen food were good to eat. All the facilities are properly managed by the college management.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Animation and Digital Media - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our batch was a really good batch. We went on trips. All the students were really friendly and supportive. We enjoyed our college life. The crowd is really good in the design course. Around 60 % of students got placements, but they were unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good in the design block and hostel. It is fully air-conditioned. Labs are there with all the design software. Classrooms have a projector, speakers board and screen. It is really fun studying at GD Goenka. Wi-Fi is available with good speed in the block and hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Animation and Digital Media - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are not that good. They were giving unpaid internships to the past student. But now I guess it will improve as GD Goenka has tied up with UID.
content.Infrastructure: There is a mac lab in our college. The block is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available with good speed. The classroom is spacious with a projector and speakers. The block has an auditorium also. Facilities are cool and the rules are strict in GD Goenka like fines.
content.Faculty: Semester exams are a little difficult as we have mostly practicals. Sometimes the external is not good so they ask a lot of questions. But facilities try their best to give good marks to students, and they're supportive. We have a mid-term examination also for practice. Faculty members are very supportive and helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Visual Communication - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest.

content.Placements: Placements in GD Goenka are fine, you can get good placements if you're pursuing design and for all the other course placements too. The CRC helps a lot so you can be guaranteed with a fine placement. One can expect good companies to come for placements they also facilitate students in their off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest, the campus be it the main campus or the hostel campus area are well built and taken care of. The lawns and fields are well maintained. The hostel is the best part of the campus and how the rooms are made for both boys and girls, well-equipped with all the modern facilities such as Wi-Fi and power backup 24*7.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. (Hons.) in Fashion Design and Styling - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There are compulsory internships from the 2nd year. You have the internship in your last semester also. The students get placed with one of the companies they've interned with. You have the option of working in the field that you like whether that's an export house, a label/designer or a company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. You have the Wi-Fi facility that you can access with your username and password. You also have the Mac labs with all latest software. The food in the canteen had a lot of varieties. You get Indian and western food like pasta, pizza, bakes etc. The hostel rooms are good as the rooms have A/C, Wi-Fi facility, TV, and a fridge.

admission_overview.description: UID-NCR (GD Goenka University) admission 2026 is currently open. To be eligible for admission, candidates must complete the eligibility and selection criteria set by the United World Institute of Design. Candidates are offered admission based on UID DAT, Portfolio Evaluation (PE) and Personal Interview (PI) and Situation Test (ST) and Portfolio Evaluation (PE) in both online and offline modes. However, UID DAT is an online exam. Candidates can read the article to know more.

paragraphs: Theadmission process in UID-NCR (GD Goenka University)for the BDes and MDes courses is a four-step process. Students can check the detailed admission process below:
UID-NCR (GD Goenka University) Application Process

Unitedworld Institute of Design carries an application form in both online and offline modes. Candidates looking for admission to any course must fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria before applying for admission. After filling out the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to visit the official website of the college or visit the college campus in person to apply for admission.
Application Screening & Shortlisting
Unitedworld Institute of Design selects candidates based on entrance test marks. The college considers UID-DAT scores for admission to BDes and MDes programmes.
Portfolio Review & Personal Interaction
Those clearing the screening test are shortlisted for a portfolio review and personal interaction round. The evaluation process and their weightage is as below:
Weightage (Out of 100)
Design Aptitude Test (DAT)
Part A: Situation Test (ST)
Part B Portfolio Evaluation (PE)
Part A: Portfolio Evaluation (PE)
Part B Personal Interview (PI)

Admission AcceptanceOnce the personal interaction round with the portfolio review is over, through e-mail or any appropriate medium, the university will communicate the results to the shortlisted candidates. To confirm one's seat after being selected, they have to pay the first instalment of theUnitedworld Institute of Design feebased on the guidelines set by them.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for UID Delhi-NCR?
faqs.answer: UID Delhi-NCR involves a two-tier evaluation process comprising the UID DAT followed by the Situation Test and Portfolio Evaluation. Check the detailed admission process below:UID Delhi-NCR Application Process:Unitedworld Institute of Design Delhi-NCR application process is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates seeking admission to various courses at the institute need to register themselves through the official website.Shortlisting of Candidates:After submitting an application, candidates will be selected based on the scores obtained by them in the Design Aptitude Test (UID DAT) conducted by the institute. Further, the candidates will be required to go through the Situation Test and Portfolio Evaluation (ST-PE).Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation:The students selected for respective courses must pay the admission fee to confirm their seats at UID Delhi-NCR.

The selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the UID DAT exam and Situation Test & Portfolio evaluation, which is conducted in offline mode.

faqs.question: Can I edit UID DAT 2026 application form?
faqs.answer: Once the UID DAT application form is submitted, there is no option to edit it. So, candidates need to be careful when filling out the application form.

placement_data.title: United World Institute of Design, GD Goenka University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the official website, more than 1,200 recruiters have visited the campus in recent past during United World Institute of Design placements. Companies such as Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro and Caterpillar made PPOs during the placement drive 2025 .

The Institute has a dedicated career development centre that not only facilitates placement related activities but also provide comprehensive career services. The career services offered by UID includes portfolio development , resume building, counselling sessions and interview preparation. Other than this, students gain exposure through live projects, internships and industry interactions across multiple sectors. United World Institute of Design, GD Goenka University also conducts webinars and industry seminars along with alumni networking events .

faqs.question: How much is the course fee for Unitedworld Institute of Design Gurgaon BDes?
faqs.answer: The course fee of the BDes programme at Unitedworld Institute of Design Gurgaon ranges between INR 24 Lacs - INR 40 lakh. The college offers a wide range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. It is mainly concerned with the Design stream and offers courses across several specialisations such as Industrial Design, Interior & Experience Design, Visual Experiential Design, Fashion Design, Apparel Design, Communication Design, and many more. At the UG level, the college offers a BDes programme to students for 4 years.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BDes at UID Delhi-NCR?
faqs.answer: At UID Delhi-NCR, the total fee for BDes (Hons) course is INR 24 lakh. Whereas, the total fee for BDes (GDP) course is INR 40 lakh. The total fee is inclusive of multiple other components that need to be paid during the time of admission. However, t his information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at UID Delhi-NCR?
faqs.answer: At UID Delhi-NCR, the tuition fees for a four-year BDes (Hons) course is INR 24 Lacs. Whereas, the tuition fee for BDes (GDP) course is INR 40 Lacs.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management of this college.
reviews.review_text: UID has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students. All kinds of modern facilities were available for the students interactive learning. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities were given to the students. Mess and canteen food were good to eat. All the facilities are properly managed by the college management.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good in the design block and hostel. It is fully air-conditioned. Labs are there with all the design software. Classrooms have a projector, speakers board and screen. It is really fun studying at GD Goenka. Wi-Fi is available with good speed in the block and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a mac lab in our college. The block is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available with good speed. The classroom is spacious with a projector and speakers. The block has an auditorium also. Facilities are cool and the rules are strict in GD Goenka like fines.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is where the college shines the brightest, the campus be it the main campus or the hostel campus area are well built and taken care of. The lawns and fields are well maintained. The hostel is the best part of the campus and how the rooms are made for both boys and girls, well-equipped with all the modern facilities such as Wi-Fi and power backup 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. You have the Wi-Fi facility that you can access with your username and password. You also have the Mac labs with all latest software. The food in the canteen had a lot of varieties. You get Indian and western food like pasta, pizza, bakes etc. The hostel rooms are good as the rooms have A/C, Wi-Fi facility, TV, and a fridge.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is so average here and sometimes, it is horrible.
reviews.review_text: Labs are average, and sometimes we struggled to do our projects because of the non-availability of the gadgets. The infrastructure of the hostel is fine. The quality of the food is average. Medical Facilities are average. Sports and the games facilities are so poor.

reviews.review_heading: Gd Goenka is an amazing university for fashion designing and faculty is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: 1. The facility and infrastructure are really good with design lab, big classrooms, photoshoot room, material lab, stitching lab Dyeing lab. 2. The facility in hostel is also good as all the meal have a fix timetable.

faqs.answer: A:    CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination is CBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college to experience.

review_content.Placements: Students in my course are placed according to their interests if they want to pursue their studies further. They can, and if they want placement, they can take the TPP subject for Rs. 4,000 or Rs. 5,000 for being placed. The average package is, I think, 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The best thing about our department is that we can also sit in pharmacy placements and in marketing placements, which gives us a chance. They provide internships that are paid, in college only, and unpaid, also that are linked to organisations like PBTI, thank you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Department's infrastructure and facilities are good, there is Wi-Fi, labs are there, classrooms for different sections are there, library is there, on other hand, the food in hostel is average, infrastructure is good, canteen is good, medical facilities are good, sports and games are genuinely good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Average and budget-friendly option with normal placements.

review_content.Placements: 50-60% of students were placed, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA, whereas the highest package went to 18-20 LPA. Companies like EPAM, PhysicsWallah, Watchguard, TCS, Cognizant, FICO, Deloitte, Accenture, KPIT, LG, Namma Yatri and DBS were the recruiting companies. Top roles offered were Quality Analyst, Software Developer, and Data Analyst, and there were not many internships that were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is just average, classrooms are pretty much normal, and there is no Wi-fi. The library is also not that big and has just basic course-related books. Labs are also not that highly developed. The boys' hostel is good, but in the girls' hostel, many problems do occur, and the mess food is not that good, but they do have variety, and food is provided on time. Basic medical facilities are available on campus, and there is an arrangement of sports too. Also, a plus point is that the hostel does have a gym, and the campus is quite beautiful and peaceful in the evening.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran

review_content.Placements: Placement is good. About 65 percent of last semester's students got placed. The average package is about 5–6 LPA. Placement drives are continuing. Students from Chandigarh Engineering College also go to Chandigarh University during placement drives, as they have joint placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Chandigarh Group of Colleges (CGC), Landran is a good college as it is one of the premier colleges in Chandigarh. The college received rank 3 in Punjab among the Top 50 private institutes by the Times B School Rankings 2024. It offers 55+ courses under seven domains, namely Engineering, Biotechnology, Computer Application, Management, Education, Pharmacy and Hotel Management. The college has 8 different colleges under CGC and all these colleges are affiliated with IK Gujral Punjab Technical University (IKGPTU), NCHMCT, and Punjabi University (Patiala).

admission_overview.title: Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: CGC Landran admissions are offered mainly on the basis of academic merit in the last qualifying exam. CGC Landran offers courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These are offered in the fields of Engineering, Business Management, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, Science, Commerce, and more. Students can apply both online or offline. The online process can be completed at the website of the college. For offline process, students can walk-in to the campus of CGC Landran. The college may accept national-level exams for admission to certain courses.

eligibility_selection.title: Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran Eligibility & Selection 2026

Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for popular CGC Landran courses:

Eligible students can start with application followed by shortlisting/ counselling and admission confirmation. Interested students can check below the steps to complete the admission process of the CGC Landran courses:
Application Process 2026

The mode of application at CGC Landran is both online and offline. Candidates must apply and pay the required application fees before the last date of application. The quick guide of application is as below:
CGC Landran Selection Process 2026

Students are mainly selected based on their academic performance. For some programmes, the college may accept national-level exam or ask students to go through a counselling rounds. The selection process however, mainly is as below:
Confirmation of Admissions
Candidates who have been allocated a seat must confirm their seat by paying theCGC Landran fees.
lists: CGC Landran Online Application Process- Go to the college's site and apply by clicking on the 'Apply Now' option and filling up the form. Upload documents and pay the fees to complete the process.

UG courses- Based on Class 12 marks

placement_report.college_name: CGC Landran Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC Landran Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC Landran recorded an impressive placement record for the Class of 2025. More than 1300 companies participated and presented more than 10000 job offers to the sudents of the batch 2025. The overall highest package offered during CGC Landran placements 2025 stood at INR 54 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of CGC Landran in 2025 include Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. The highest package secured by the BCom (Hons) batch 2025 was INR 17.03 LPA.

Engineering was initially the main degree among the CGC Landran courses, but as time passed, more and more courses were added to the curriculum, including MTech, BTech, MBA, and MCA. In 2021, Chandigarh Group of Colleges Landran received the 4th Education Leadership Award and Excellence in Innovation & Research in WIEF, Start-Up India, and IALM. CGC Landran has effectively assisted students in reaching their desired CGC Landran placement goals since the inception of the placement cell in 2001.

hostel_campus.college_name: CGC Landran Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels have semi furnished rooms with attached washrooms and well-furnished common rooms with TV with DTH connection. Hostel also has air cooler facility within the rooms of hostel. Other facilities include separate gym for girls and boys, well equipped reading room, 24 hour security, laundry service, music room, wi-fi, 24x7 power supply and hygienic mess facility with vegetarian meals.

library.description: CGC library is well equipped with over 40, 000 books on varied subjects.It has a memberships of 10 e-journals and has125 web-based courses through NPTEL. It also has 136 video courses prepared by the faculty of IITs and other leading institutions of India that are taught over the internet. The library subscribes to national and international subject journals, national and regional dailies.It can accommodate around 300 students at a time. The library maintains a separate “Book Bank” collection exclusively for the meritorious students. The central library has a collection of 20582 titles and subscribes to 200+ journals, magazines & periodicals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Courts, Table Tennis Tables

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, Good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The labs and Wi-Fi are actually great, and the library has every book I? Ve needed. Hostel life is okay rooms are decent, but mess food is definitely hit-or-miss. Canteen snacks and the sports complex are the real highlights here. Solid experience, enjoying.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college for your career development.
reviews.review_text: A good infrastructure with good services and environment, hostel food is a bit bad, but overall facilities are good, safe for girls, strict guards at the gate don't allow outsiders in college. The canteens are available for day scholars and students. Overall have a good infrastructure. Labs are available for better understanding, and students can experience real-time experiences in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to experience.

reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi connected, and the classrooms are big enough. They have proper fans, lighting, and exhaust fans. Every classroom has a projector and a whiteboard. Hostel food is average, sometimes good, and sometimes bad. Non-veg food is available on selected days in the hostel mess. Medical services are available 24/7 with an ambulance for emergencies. Grounds for football, volleyball, basketball, and badminton are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 19 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good for CSE students but needs some improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department has high speed Wi-Fi advanced labs smart classrooms and a well stocked library. Hostel facilities are comfortable mess food is decent canteen is clean and students get proper medical support along with good sports and gym facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: A good Wi-Fi connection is provided. Mess food is good. All facilities were provided in good condition, and they kept both healthy and junk food. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also provided for both hostellers and day scholars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 26 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is above average in the private university segment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is wonderful. In recent years, the infrastructure of the college is maintained very well. Regular construction and small changes make it much better than other colleges. Labs are fully functional and air-conditioned. Air conditioning is missing in classrooms, but still, the classrooms are well-ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: The fee is minimal, but according to their placements, there are some bad things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, but the hostel food is very bad. Labs are okay. The library is good. There is no Wi-Fi for students' self-study.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities that help us in making our careers and improving our skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a good infrastructure at our college, good and large classrooms, labs with all facilities, a food court with a vast menu, a library with all subject-related books, and competitive books related to the course. Our college also introduces various sports events like volleyball, cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied as a student .
reviews.review_text:
Great infrastructure and facilities are available in cgc Landran labs are good enough SMART classes are available, libraries are well maintained OG Wi-Fi connections
Food are tasty, good mess, impressive hostel room well maintained canteens, sports with great ground .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our course is the best. Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available in all classes. All labs are good. Classrooms are very good in library, and all books are available. Quality of hostel facilities is good. The quality of food in mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our courses are very good. The labs have provided Wi-Fi,  AC, and classroom infrastructure, which is also well and good. The quality of facilities in our hostel is excellent, and the quality of food is good in taste.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere. All labs are available. All classrooms are good, neat, and clean. Library is good and all books are available. Our classroom is very good. And I love my college. I recommend choosing this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Chandigarh Engineering College, Chandigarh Group of Colleges, LandranReviewed on 20 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are good placements and a chill campus life.
reviews.review_text: There are just fans in classrooms. Wi-Fi is available only in the lab rooms. The library has a proper set of books related to the course. Semi-furnished rooms, 24-hour security, 2 gyms, on-campus medical facilities, and reading rooms are available in the hostel. The hostel mess used to serve only vegetarian food, but the food used to be very tasty. There are multiple canteens on the college premises. There are 3 main gardens, 1 Parivartan ground, 1 COE ground, and 1 is the famous fighter planet ...

data.description: The faculty of CGC Landran is very knowledgeable, friendly and extremely qualified. The faculty members are PhD holders. Their teaching methodology involves a case-study approach, presentations, class participation, industrial visit, live projects, simulation, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran

likes.text: Many top-notch recruiting companies of our college are Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Capgemini, Accenture, Delloite, Byju's, Chegg India Pvt. Ltd., Wipro, TCS, etc.
Thus the placements of the college is very good and college and staff putting more n more efforts so that students is placed in different companies.
Top roles offered are software developer, manager, sales, marketing, business development manager, information technology engineer, technical recruiter, accountant, and HR.

college_info.intro:
Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University popular programmes are BTech, BSc and MBA. The university offers BTech courses for duration of 4 years. DBUU provides BTech programme in CSE, AI & Machine Learning, Cyber Security & Forensics, Data Science, Aerospace Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and others.
Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University DBUU Dehradun offers a full-time, 3 year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc courses offered in Agriculture, Forestry, Forensic Science, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Zoology, Food Technology, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, , BBA, BAMS, , BCA, BCom, BA, BPT, and other courses offered to the students. At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MCA, , MHA, MHMTT, , MPH, MDes, and other programmes offered to the students. Below mentioned are the along with the eligibility criteria and Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University fee structure:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

review_content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.
