review_summary.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.

content.Placements: There are 90% of students who were placed in the B.Tech course this year. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA in top companies like Swaraj, Mahindra, and Robbins.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I will complete B.Tech in Computer Science (2025-2029). Around 75-80% students are placed. The highest package is about 20 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average is 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 60% got internships as developers or analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: More focus on social media and digital marketing.

content.Placements: The CEO of my college is around 30 to 40% per year, depending on their strength and the skills they have gained during the academic sessions. With the help of psychology and extracurricular activities, they have secured placements in very reputable companies.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

admission_overview.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Selection and Application form

admission_process.title: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission 2025is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates near the University can visit the campus and purchase the application form from the admission office. Aspirants willing to apply online must visit the University's official website. Admissions to the programmes offered atDBUUare done on a merit basis for all courses. The university shortlists the candidates based on their merit in the qualifying exam. Students seeking to get admission to the courses offered at the university can refer to the following article to learn the detailedadmission procedure for Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University.

TheDBUU admission criteriaare merit-based for most of its courses. Candidates willing to take admission can apply online or offline. Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than thirty undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma courses. The university accepts students for its BAMS programme based on NEET scores. The courses are offered via its ten constituent schools in different streams such as Nursing,Engineeringand Technology, Arts,Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can check out the table below for topDBBU courses:

TheDev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission processis a multi-step process that begins with the release of the application forms and ends with the submission of admission confirmation fees by the selected candidates. The step-wiseDBUU admission processis given below:
Step 1: DBUU Application Process 2025
The application process is conducted in online and offline modes. Interested candidates can apply for admission either by visiting the official website of the university or the college campus.
Step 2: Shortlisting of candidates
The candidates are shortlisted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Result declaration and Admission Confirmation
The University releases a merit list on the official website. Selected candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fees to book their seats.

faqs.question: Can I join Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions directly?
faqs.answer: YES,You can directly take admission to Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions (DBGI). The Applicant can walk directly into the campus & meet the admission counselor, who will counsel the student regarding the different courses and the eligibility criteria.The candidate must have passed the 10+2 examination or equivalent with a minimum of 45% marks in Total and also have Mathematics as a subject in the qualifying examination then it was eligible to be admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than 30 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and doctoral levels. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Nursing, Management, Engineering, Design, Science, etc. DBUU offers these courses via its ten constituent schools.Candidates can refer to the table below for DBUU school and courses offered under them:SchoolCourses OfferedSchool of Engineering and ComputingBTech, BCA, BSc, MTech, MCA and PhDSchool of Management and CommerceBBA, BCom, MBA, PhDSchool of Pharmacy and ResearchDiploma, BPharm, MPharm, PharmD, PhDSchool of Hotel ManagementDiploma, BHM, BBA, MHM, PhDSchool of Allied SciencesBSc, MSc, PhDSchool of AgricultureBSc, BTech, MScSchool of Architecture, Planning and DesignDiploma, BArch, BPlan, BDes, BSc, MPlanDev Bhoomi Medical College of Paramedical SciencesBMLT, BPT, BMRIT, BSc, BHA, MHA, MPHSchool of Journalism and Liberal ArtsBDes, BSc, BA, BFA, MA, PhDSchool of NursingGNM, BSc

faqs.question: How to apply for BPharm admission at DBUU?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi University BPharm application process is conducted online and offline. To apply in the offline mode, aspirants can visit the university campus and purchase the application form. For online application, they can follow the below-given steps:Step 1:Visit the official website of the University.Step 2:Click on 'Admissions' on the taskbar of the homepage and select the 'Apply now' option from the drop-down.Step 3:On the redirected page, fill out the registration form using a valid email ID and phone number.Step 4:Log in using the credentials generated in the previous step and fill out the application form.Step 5:Pay the application fee of INR 1,500 and click on submit.

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University placement cell also known as the Corporate Resource Centre plays an important role in placing students fromm all courses. So far, more than 15,500 offers have been provided to students over the years. The placement rate achieved during DBUU placements 2025 was 80%. The highest and average package recorded during the placements was INR 43 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Companies like Jaro Education, TCS, Intellipaat, Zscaler and many more were part of the placement season.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in MBA at Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For Master of Business Administration, the Human Resourses/ International Buisness/Marketing and Finance are best courses in Dev Bhoomi Group Of Institution. However, Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions offers MBA courses in various specializations such as HR, International Business, Marketing, Finance, Agri Business, Business Analytics, Family Business & Entrepreneurship. The School of Management and Commerce at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University provides a diverse range of courses which include B.Com, BBA, and MBA highly dedicated to reshaping students into trained professionals who can serve the vital verticals of the Management system.

faqs.question: How good are the BCom placements at DBUU?
faqs.answer: DBUU has not released the placement data specifically applying to BCom placements at the university. hostel_campus.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

reviews.review_heading: More focus on social media and digital marketing.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

reviews.review_heading: College makes more interest in events and several activities. The teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works average many times. Labs are average. Classrooms are also good. The library is average. The facilities in the hostel are average. The food is average, and the canteen is open from 10 AM to 9 PM. The hostel provides medical support if there is a serious illness, and they also have ambulance service for students. There are many events for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is mainly for the HOD curriculum, and there is a lack of sports facilities. However, if you talk about studies, proper management and facilities for the students and their future, the college infrastructure is good for the students who mainly focus on academics. Nevertheless, it lacks in providing that benefit for students who focus on extracurricular activities like sports and other pursuits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, decent campus life. Average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available for the course are decent. Wi-Fi is rather slow but okay. There is a library at the top. Classrooms contain projectors with whiteboards. Some contain smart boards. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but okay. There are vending machines in every hostel, so you don't have to go to the canteen. The canteen contains good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All in all, DBUU can be a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here we are provided with two tables, as the room is a 2-seater, and you can choose the number of seats you want. There are two beds, one almirah, and an attached room with a commode and basin. The cleaners come every day to clean the room, and on Sundays, the washrooms are cleaned. The hostel with a three-seater non-attached washrooms room is 80,000, and the 2-seater with attached washrooms is 110,000 with a 5,000 registration fee. I would suggest taking a PG or rented apartment; it will cost h...

reviews.review_heading: School-like college, uniform-wala college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working anywhere in the labs. The labs are good enough for students to train for themselves, and faculty train them for the industry. Hostel food is very hygienic, but the taste of the food is not that good. The food is only good and tasty at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget, a school like college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly on our campus, it's not connecting well. The labs are well maintained and very good, the classrooms are very good, the capacity of students is above 100, and the library is good enough for studying. The librarian is strict about noise. Hostel food is good, but not that hygienic. Safety concerns are always at the top for food.

reviews.review_heading: MBA experience that feels practical but self-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and good, which helps when MBA work becomes hard. Classrooms are suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet works for normal use, but is inconsistent at times. The library is decent for reference and exam preparation. Hostel life is simple and disciplined. Rooms are clean, but facilities are basic. Mess food is average and repetitive, so most students don't expect much variety. Overall, the environment is functional rather than luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: The MBA course here is more about efforts than hype.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quiet and away from the city, which helps us to focus on our studies. MBA classrooms are comfortable and suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet is available but not always reliable for heavy work. The library is useful mainly during exams and project submissions. Hostels are basic but livable, with regular cleaning. Mess food is simple and repetitive, so many students prefer canteen food or outside options occasionally.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Architecture and Design, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are seeking a design course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Hostel rooms are good with Wi-Fi, though there is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Clean food is provided in the mess and canteens. Vending machines are available for late-night cravings. There is a 24/7 water and electricity supply for uninterrupted study sessions. Laundry facilities are available, and washing machines are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best emerging university in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Classrooms are like a school. The library is very brilliant in our college. In the hostel, electricity is not constant. The mess food is not hygienic, and it is average. It has average medical facilities. Doctors are also not available on time, and a doctor is not that well-qualified.

data.description: The faculty members at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University are well-qualified, experienced, and dedicated to impart quality education to the students. The faculty focuses on theoretical and practical knowledge for the students. The faculty engages the students with the latest activities and innovative teaching, and quality research.

college_info.intro:
Royal Global University popular programmes are BTech, BSc, BPharma and MBA. The university offers a BTech programme to students across several specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechatronics, and others. RGU Guwahati BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. Further, Royal Global University Guwahati BTech students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineers, Robotics Engineers, and others.
Assam Royal Global University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA programme to students in specialisations, including Finance, Marketing, HRM, Operations, Business Analytics, and others. Royal Global University MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers, and others. review_content.Placements: About 25% of students got placed. Medical colleges are the top recruiters. About 65% of students got internships. Lab Technician is the top role offered in my course because it is a paramedical course. Things can be improved. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, canteens, and infrastructures are of top-notch quality, and the quality of food is reasonable, but one thing that struck me is that the whole university campus is vegetarian. So non-vegetarian food may be a little bit difficult to find, but the taste is not bad.

reviews_list.review_title: College experience is nice and it will help to build your future.

review_content.Placements: 50 students got their placements. The salary offered was 3 LPA. Company was in good location, and they provided all the requirements of the employees. Maximum number of students got their internship from our course. The top role was maintaining the computer security system.
review_content.Infrastructure: The staffs were very nice. College provided all the requirements of the students like AC, fan, and proper ventilation. The hostel facilities were very good in terms of behaviour. The food was nice and they also provided sports-related things which could help students to freshen their minds in the evening.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In the B.A. In the Political Science course, we have a maximum of 60 students for the whole semester. The salary is Rs. 43,300, which is both the highest and the lowest. Many students get internships in this course at Guwahati University, in various NGOs, research institutes, and government bodies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure include full AC service across the entire university, with a huge auditorium, banking services, classrooms and studios, fine arts studio, fashion studios, incubation centre, legal facilities, moot court, etc. Hostel facilities are also good, with separate accommodations for boys and girls, and the food is totally amazing.

individual_reviews.title: It has heart-welcoming infrastructure.

content.Placements: Specific companies like research, pharmaceutical, and chemical-based sectors are only invited for our discipline for on-campus recruitment. Companies offer an average salary that ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. More than 30 companies arrive for our discipline.
content.Infrastructure: I'm proud to be a part of the biggest university, with versatile facilities and well-known for its service. The management would provide liberty for the students' movement to take part in any of the activities, like sports, college events, internships, or visits. Students' suggestions are appreciated and welcome.

admission_overview.college_name: Royal Global University Admission 2022: Application Process, Eligibility Criteria, Entrance Exam, Fees

paragraphs: Royal Global University onlineadmissions are opennow for admission to all the courses. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university. Royal Global University offers merit /entrance-based admission to around 127 programmes with different specialisations. The university has a total of 27 schools offering various UG, PG, doctoral, certificate, & diploma courses. The total student intake capacity of the university is around 240 students. The university also conducts its entrance test for admission to some programmes. Apart from this, RGU admissions are also based on several other national-level entrance exams. RGU offers up to 100% merit-based scholarships to its students. Over 250 companies have visited the university every year for campus placements. The campus of RGU is equipped with various facilities like library, indoor stadium, separate hostels for boys & girls, and café, etc.

Royal Global University offers online admission for all the programmes. Candidates willing to get admission to the university can apply online on the oficial website of the university. Below mentioned are the eligibility criteria along with the RGU fees and accepted entrance exams for RGU popular courses:
Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Eligibility:Graduation in any discipline
Entrance exam:Royal University Entrance Test/CAT/XAT/GMAT/MAT/CMAT

faqs.question: When is RGU - Royal Global University application forms out?
faqs.answer: RGU University forms are out usually in April.If you want to apply for the MBA programme at Royal Global University, you usually start the process in April. placement_data.title: Royal Global University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Royal Global University has a Royal Centre for Corporate Relations (RCCR) that envisages enhancing the placement prospects of the students. The centre grooms students ethically as well as in terms of attitude and aptitude through regular sessions of training, mock GDs and PIs. The official placement report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the highest package offered to recently passed-out students was INR 6 LPA and the lowest package during Royal Global University placements stood at INR 2.50 LPA . In addition to this, the Royal Global University average package stood at INR 3.40 LPA .

faqs.question: What activities are conducted during Royal Global University placement drive?

Some of the activities conducted are as follows: Royal Global University Placements Activities Regular sessions of technical training Grooming sessions for personality development Mock group discussions (GD), personal interviews (PI) and online test practices Personnel from the centre visit potential employers in the industrial and corporate sectors Interactive sessions with corporate houses Industrial tours Workshops on in-demand skills Research paper presentations Interactive sessions with alumni Internship opportunities in government, semi-government and private sector Strong industry interface -

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing DPharm at Royal Global University?
faqs.answer: Yes, t here are many government jobs available for students after completing a DPharma at RGU Guwahati. Like every other course, DPharma holders are also being increasingly inclined towards government jobs due to the stability and job security associated with them. These jobs are available in various set-ups, such as government hospitals, community health centers, health and welfare departments, and public sector medical stores. Some of these jobs are listed below: Pharmacist Clinical pharmacist Pharmacologist Assistant professor Data analyst Hospital pharmacy director Pharmacist in charge Retail pharmacist Clinical research associate (CRA) Food and drug administration

faqs.question: What is the fee for BPharm at Royal Global University?
faqs.answer: BPharm fee at Royal Global University can be paid in two instalment plans. Candidates can choose to either pay the total fee in annual instalments or semester-wise instalments. The total RGU Guwahati BPharm fees in both the cases are as follows: In case of yearly instalments of INR 1.73 Lacs per annum : INR 6.92 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees) In case of semesterly instalments of INR 88,000 per semester : INR 7.04 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees) NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at RGU - Royal Global University expensive?
faqs.answer: MBA at Royal Global University is a 2-year course at the PG level. The course offers admission to 60 students. The total tuition fee for the Royal Global University Master of Business Administration (MBA) is 4.5 lakhs. Which is the average fee structure for an MBA. Around 4 to 5 Lacs in almost most of the universities charge this fee. The above are only tuition fees. The hostel charge as well as food charge is also around 4 Lakhs. So, overall doing an MBA from RGU costs 8.5 lakh, which is slightly more in comparison to other colleges.

hostel_campus.college_name: Royal Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: RGU has Separate in-campus hostels for girls and boys are equipped with adequate facilities which help hostellers to imbibe a different lifestyle which involve them in activities like sports, yoga, music depending on their taste and preferences. Air conditioned hostel having two and three bedded rooms laid out in beautiful clusters offering plenty of buddy time to serve the effervescent mind along with 24 hour electricity, water supply, internet, TV sets, gyms and lifts. Tastefully designed state-of- the-art dinning facility, separate for boys and girls, have been created inside the university campus, equipped with modern hygienic mechanized kitchens offering wholesome and nourishing meals.
facilities: The location and infrastructure of the campus: You should choose a campus that is close to your home, has good connectivity, and offers adequate facili

library.description: RGU Central Library stands today with a digital platform supporting e-resources, a collection of more than 20,000 books in print including reference books covering all the disciplinary areas. The library has good number of national and international journals along with J-GATE online archive and DELNET. With its wide collection of all leading magazines the management also has its own in-house publications. The library is fully computerized and maintains bibliographic & dictionary databases under SOUL and simultaneously maintains its database under institutional ERP.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash, Billiards, Table Tennis, Kabaddi court

cafeteria.description:
A healthy mind can reside only in a healthy body. The cafeteria at RGU is perfect to refresh after the hectic class schedule. It provides the students the much needed platform to ease and revitalize for the subsequent sessions. Also, it provides a space for professional dialogue where they can discuss on various areas of interest over a cup of coffee.

The Bistro, Woods Café, F5 and d dhaba offer extensive menu of scrumptious food which is both hygienic and healthy to cater to all tastes.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash, Billiards, Table Tennis, Kabaddi court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Engineering Workshop

reviews.review_heading: It has heart-welcoming infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm proud to be a part of the biggest university, with versatile facilities and well-known for its service. The management would provide liberty for the students' movement to take part in any of the activities, like sports, college events, internships, or visits. Students' suggestions are appreciated and welcome.

reviews.review_heading: The review of the social work department at Royal Global University.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in every teacher's staff room. Library is very useful for students who need to work, and it is easily accessible to all students with a good network. In every corner, there is Wi-Fi available, even when the network is down, students can make use of it.

reviews.review_heading: The Assam Royal Global University is a diamond hidden in the dumps of Assam.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, canteens, and infrastructures are of top-notch quality, and the quality of food is reasonable, but one thing that struck me is that the whole university campus is vegetarian. So non-vegetarian food may be a little bit difficult to find, but the taste is not bad.

reviews.review_heading: College experience is nice and it will help to build your future.
reviews.review_text: The staffs were very nice. College provided all the requirements of the students like AC, fan, and proper ventilation. The hostel facilities were very good in terms of behaviour. The food was nice and they also provided sports-related things which could help students to freshen their minds in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure include full AC service across the entire university, with a huge auditorium, banking services, classrooms and studios, fine arts studio, fashion studios, incubation centre, legal facilities, moot court, etc. Hostel facilities are also good, with separate accommodations for boys and girls, and the food is totally amazing.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for M.Sc. in zoology course.
reviews.review_text: Campus Wi-Fi and infrastructure were mediocre. The zoology department had decent classrooms and an open library. The hostel was mediocre. The quality of mess meal was subpar. The college also offered games and sports. Although it was located far from the department, the hostel was there. It's not decent food.

reviews.review_heading: The course is decent. Some things could be better, but overall it's above average.
reviews.review_text: RGU has a good infrastructure for my course. We have a dedicated animation lab and a classroom. Most of the work is done on our laptops, and we are provided with a well-equipped space that includes plug points. The campus also offers good common rooms, sports facilities, classrooms, and food canteens.

reviews.review_heading: This university has the best infrastructure in the North East, along with good education quality.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is amazing. I don’t think there is any other university in the entire Northeast with this kind of infrastructure. In my field of Biotechnology, I can say it’s a good place to study, with high-tech laboratory facilities and practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great for teaching, classes, extracurricular activities, festivals, events, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Diagnostic laboratory, classroom, hostel, library, canteen, and doctor room are available. Medical facilities, sports, and mess are available. Our college is one of the best colleges in Assam for infrastructure. It is very helpful for us.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and I will recommend students to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good, and the food provided in the mess is acceptable. I find the hostel food to be lacking in taste. As for sports, my college is commendable since it offers a variety of indoor and outdoor activities. There is a varsity week every year.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good, comfortable, and peaceful for studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel accommodation was great, providing many facilities and hygienic food. Daily cleaning of rooms was provided, along with 24-hour electricity supply and clean water. The food quality was also good, and a variety of the Menu was provided during the week. The hostel fee was Rs.2,10,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty (500+), good infrastructure, events, and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have their personalised ACs. In hostels, only veg is allowed. The campus keeps various traditions in mind. We have 4+ cafeterias on our campus along with a desert bar, dominos, and more. Many blocks are being constructed and more hostels as well.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus, for sure a good college life and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best in Ghy. Royal is well known for its good campus and top-class infrastructure. Hostels are way too good. We have added a swimming pool and gym this year. The campus is totally veg, and no non-veg items are allowed inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: The food in the hotel is delicious, and as the pandemic continues, we don’t need to go out and buy our food. They bring breakfast, lunch, and dinner to our room. The architecture is fantastic, and there are plenty of vantage points on the RGU roof, which looks amazing. Since RGU is located in Assam, it has a lot of greenery and fresh air. You will hear about the world all the time. Wi-Fi is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.Sc. in Botany course.
reviews.review_text: There are no problems with electricity, Wi-Fi is always available, and the quality of the food is excellent. The fitness center is well-maintained, and the gymnasium is excellent. The lab is well maintained, and all equipment is in good working order which helps in learning technical skills. Classrooms are equipped with all the facilities that students need during class time, such as Wi-Fi.

data.description: Yes, Royal Global University provides hostel facilities to its students (boys and girls) on a first come first serve basis, subject to availability of seats. Candidates seeking hostel accomodation must submit a Hostel Form Fee of INR 100, along with the applicable RGU Guwahati hostel fees (which are inclusive of the mess charges) depending on the type of hostel chosen. The university offers 2-seater,  3-seater,  4-seater,  5-seater hostels and dormitories. The annual fees for various hostels range between INR 1.2 Lacs and INR 2.4 lakh. The admission fee of INR 15,000 are common to all the hostels and the dormitory. The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university. They are still subject to chaneg and hence, are indicative.
